Kansas City Royals move game up due to potential storms
content: Kansas City Royals move game up due to potential storms THAT NUMBER WILL GO DOWN AS WE GET INTO A DRIER AIR MASS. WE’VE ALSO HAD A LOT OF RAIN. SO THE ROADS THIS MORNING AS YOU COMMUTE IN ARE WET. THERE’S LARGE PONDING ON THE ROADWAYS. AND ONCE MORE PEOPLE GET OUT ON THE ROADWAYS. YOU CAN IMAGINE IT’S GOING TO REALLY SLOW DOWN THIS MORNING. SO YOU MAY WANT TO GIVE YOURSELF SOME EXTRA TIME. HERE ARE THE THUNDERSTORMS, NONE OF WHICH ARE PRODUCING SEVERE WEATHER FOR THIS MORNING. AND NOW WE RETURN TO FUTURE SCAN THAT SHOWS YOU THIS RAIN. I THOUGHT EARLIER WHEN I WAS WRITING KIND OF A REPORT, I SAID THE RAIN SHOULD BE OUT OF HERE SOON. IT MAY NOT BE. IT MAY NOT LINGER. IT MAY NOT GET OUT OF HERE UNTIL BETWEEN TEN AND NOON TODAY. AND THEN WE DO BREAK OUT INTO A LITTLE BIT OF SUNSHINE LATE IN THE AFTERNOON. I WANT TO MOVE THE MAP TO THE WEST, THOUGH, SO THAT YOU CAN SEE WHAT WILL MOST LIKELY BECOME A TORNADO OUTBREAK FOR KANSAS AND MAYBE SOUTHERN NEBRASKA. HERE’S THE NEBRASKA KANSAS LINE. SO FROM MARYSVILLE, KANSAS, MANHATTAN AND SALINA. THESE ARE SUPERCELL THUNDERSTORMS. THOSE ARE ROTATING THUNDERSTORMS CAPABLE OF LARGE TORNADOES AND LARGE HAIL. THAT IS ALL WEST OF KANSAS CITY, THOUGH. IN THE AFTERNOON AND EARLY EVENING HOURS WHEN IT ARRIVES INTO OUR AREA, WHICH WILL BE PROBABLY AFTER 9 P.M., CLOSER TO 11, YOU CAN SEE THAT IT BECOMES MORE OF A LINE SEGMENT. THAT’S WHEN OUTFLOW WINDS, DAMAGING STRAIGHT LINE WINDS WOULD BE POSSIBLE, BUT WE STILL HAVE THE POTENTIAL TO HAVE SOME SPIN UPS IN THAT LINE. AND IT’S NOT JUST ONE LINE. IT MAY BE SEVERAL LINES, SEVERAL CLUSTERS OF THUNDERSTORMS THAT HIT US LATE TONIGHT, VERY EARLY NOTICE. THE TIME STAMP NOW HAS MOVED ON TO 2 A.M., AND WE STILL HAVE THESE IN THE AREA. AND THEN AFTER 2 A.M. THEY WILL EXIT AND THEN WE’LL HAVE DRIER CONDITIONS EXPECTED ON TUESDAY, MAYBE NOT BREAKING OUT INTO FULL SUNSHINE RIGHT AWAY, BUT AT LEAST NOT POURING ON US DURING THE AFTERNOON. ON TUESDAY. TODAY, ALL HAZARDS ARE POSSIBLE. THE TORNADO OUTBREAK IS WEST OF KANSAS CITY, BUT WE STILL HAVE THAT RISK OF SPIN UPS OF LARGE HAIL IS POSSIBLE, BUT DAMAGING STRAIGHT LINE WINDS, I THINK, IS THE BIGGEST HAZARD FOR THE KANSAS CITY METRO AREA. LATE TONIGHT, EARLY TOMORROW MORNING. SO THAT STANDS OUT AS OUR ALERT DAY TODAY. RAIN THIS MORNING, A BREAK IN THE AFTERNOON, SEVERE WEATHER POSSIBLE TONIGHT. THE RAIN ENDS EARLY TUESDAY MORNING. WE HAVE ANOTHER CHANCE OF RAIN THURSDAY NIGHT INTO FRIDAY MORNING. RIGHT NOW YOUR LABOR I’M SORRY. YOUR MEMORIAL DAY...

La Justicia de La Matanza excarceló al cantante del Grupo Green tras dos meses detenido por abuso sexual
content: La Justicia de La Matanza excarceló al cantante del Grupo Green tras dos meses detenido por abuso sexual La Justicia de La Matanza dispuso este lunes la excarcelación de Adrián Marcelo "Chelo" Torres Ruíz Díaz , cantante del Grupo Green, luego de dos meses de detención en el marco de una investigación por presunto abuso sexual. La causa permanece en etapa de instrucción y está a cargo de la fiscal Lorena Pecorelli . La resolución fue adoptada por el Juzgado de Garantías N°5 de La Matanza , que concedió la libertad al músico de música tropical. Torres había sido detenido el 11 de marzo , durante un allanamiento realizado por personal de la DDI de La Matanza en una vivienda ubicada en las calles Caguazu y Montes de Oca , en la localidad bonaerense de La Tablada . Horas antes de ese procedimiento, el cantante había sido denunciado penalmente por el presunto abuso sexual con acceso carnal de una influencer de 43 años , Angélica Lilian Escalante , conocida en redes como Dulce Lilian , quien hizo pública la acusación. Su abogado, Ignacio Barrios , pidió la prisión preventiva y sostuvo, en referencia a los antecedentes del imputado, que "estamos frente a una conducta reiterada, no a un episodio aislado" .

రెడ్ మ్యాజిక్ 11S ప్రో సిరీస్ వచ్చేసింది.. ఫీచర్స్ ఎలా ఉన్నాయంటే..?
content: రెడ్‌మి మ్యాజిక్ 11S ప్రో సిరీస్ గేమింగ్ ఫ్లాగ్‌షిప్ స్మార్ట్‌ఫోన్‌లు చైనాలో విడుదలయ్యాయి. రెడ్‌మి ఈ తాజా స్మార్ట్‌ఫోన్‌లో పనితీరు, కూలింగ్ టెక్నాలజీ, డిస్‌ప్లే నాణ్యత, బ్యాటరీ సామర్థ్యంలో అనేక మెరుగుదలలు ఉన్నాయి. ఈ గేమింగ్ స్మార్ట్‌ఫోన్, పీసీ గేమింగ్‌లో ఉండే ఫీచర్ల వంటి అనేక ఫీచర్లను కూడా అందిస్తుందని కంపెనీ పేర్కొంది. రెడ్ మ్యాజిక్ 11S ప్రో సిరీస్ ధర రెడ్ మ్యాజిక్ 11S ప్రో 12GB RAM + 256GB స్టోరేజ్‌తో కూడిన బేస్ మోడల్ చైనాలో 5,499 యువాన్ల (సుమారుగా రూ. 60,000) ప్రారంభ ధరతో విడుదలైంది. రెడ్ మ్యాజిక్ 11S ప్రో+ 12GB + 256GB కాన్ఫిగరేషన్‌తో వస్తుంది. దీని ప్రారంభ ధర 6,199 యువాన్లు (సుమారుగా రూ. 65,000). ఈ గేమింగ్ స్మార్ట్‌ఫోన్‌ల గ్లోబల్ లాంచ్‌కు సంబంధించి కంపెనీ ఇంకా ఎటువంటి వివరాలను పంచుకోలేదు. రెడ్ మ్యాజిక్ 11S ప్రో సిరీస్ ఫీచర్లు రెడ్ మ్యాజిక్ 11 ప్రో సిరీస్‌లో 144Hz రిఫ్రెష్ రేట్, 95.3 శాతం స్క్రీన్-టు-బాడీ రేషియోతో కూడిన 6.85-అంగుళాల 1.5K OLED డిస్‌ప్లే ఉంది. ఈ ఫోన్‌లో 16-మెగాపిక్సెల్ అండర్-డిస్‌ప్లే సెల్ఫీ కెమెరా ఉంది. ఈ డిస్‌ప్లే SGS, TÜV రైన్‌ల్యాండ్ ఐ ప్రొటెక్షన్ సర్టిఫికేషన్‌లను కూడా కలిగి ఉంది. ఇందులో 3D అల్ట్రాసోనిక్ ఫింగర్‌ప్రింట్ స్కానర్ కూడా ఉంది. రెడ్ మ్యాజిక్ 11S ప్రో సిరీస్ క్వాల్‌కామ్ స్నాప్‌డ్రాగన్ 8 ఎలైట్ జెన్ 5 లీడింగ్ ఎడిషన్ చిప్‌సెట్‌తో పనిచేస్తుంది. దీని CPU 4.74GHz వద్ద క్లాక్ స్పీడ్ అందిస్తుంది. ఇది AnTuTu బెంచ్‌మార్క్‌లో 4.6 మిలియన్ పాయింట్లను సాధించిందని కంపెనీ పేర్కొంది. ఈ ఫోన్‌లో రెడ్ కోర్ R4 గేమింగ్ చిప్ కూడా ఉంది. ఇది గ్రాఫిక్స్ రెండరింగ్, ఫ్రేమ్ ఇంటర్‌పొలేషన్, టచ్ రెస్పాన్స్, మొత్తం గేమింగ్ పనితీరును మెరుగుపరుస్తుంది. మెరుగైన గేమింగ్ అనుభవం కోసం, రెడ్‌మ్యాజిక్ డ్యూయల్ కూలింగ్ సిస్టమ్‌ను అందించింది. ఇందులో లిక్విడ్, ఎయిర్ కూలింగ్ సెటప్ ఉంది. దీనిలో కొత్తగా డిజైన్ చేసిన లిక్విడ్ కూలింగ్ ఛానల్, 24,000rpm కూలింగ్ ఫ్యాన్ ఉన్నాయి. ఈ కూలింగ్ ఫ్యాన్ IPX8 వాటర్ రెసిస్టెన్స్‌కు సపోర్ట్ చేస్తుందని, ఫోన్‌కు కూడా IPX8 రేటింగ్ ఉందని కంపెనీ చెబుతోంది. కెమెరా విషయానికొస్తే, ఇందులో డ్యూయల్ 50-మెగాపిక్సెల్ రియర్ కెమెరాలు, వై-ఫై 7, NFC, ఇన్‌ఫ్రారెడ్ రిమోట్ కంట్రోల్, 3.5mm హెడ్‌ఫోన్ జాక్ ఉన్నాయి. రెడ్ మ్యాజిక్ ఈ తాజా గేమింగ్ ఫోన్‌లో స్టీమ్ డైరెక్ట్ కనెక్టివిటీ కూడా ఉంది. దీని ద్వారా వినియోగదారులు అంతర్నిర్మిత గేమింగ్ స్పేస్ ద్వారా PC గేమ్‌లను ఆడవచ్చు. బ్యాటరీ గురించి మాట్లాడితే, రెడ్ మ్యాజిక్ 11S ప్రో స్మార్ట్‌ఫోన్‌లో 8000mAh బ్యాటరీ ఉంది. ఇది 80W వైర్డ్ ఛార్జింగ్‌కు సపోర్ట్ చేస్తుంది. ప్రో+ మోడల్‌లో 7500mAh బ్యాటరీతో పాటు 120W వైర్డ్ ఛార్జింగ్, 80W వైర్‌లెస్ ఛార్జింగ్ ఉన్నాయి. ప్రో+ మోడల్‌లో పూర్తి లిక్విడ్ కూలింగ్ మాడ్యూల్ కూడా ఉంది. ఇది గేమింగ్ పనితీరును పెంచుతుంది.

Indígenas de Ecuador se «solidarizan» con protestantes en Bolivia
content: La Confederación de Nacionalidades Indígenas del Ecuador ( Conaie ), la organización social más grande del país, expresó su «solidaridad» con quienes participan en las protestas que buscan la renuncia del presidente de Bolivia , Rodrigo Paz . En un pronunciamiento difundido en sus canales oficiales, la organización manifestó su «solidaridad fraterna» con los pueblos indígenas, originarios, campesinos, obreros y sectores populares bolivianos, a los que respaldó en su «legítima lucha por la defensa de sus territorios, los derechos colectivos y la plurinacionalidad». La Conaie también condenó una supuesta «represión estatal» y la «criminalización de la protesta social», y denunció lo que calificó como «graves violaciones a los derechos humanos» en Bolivia . Protestas y bloqueos La Federación de Campesinos de La Paz Túpac Katari , la Central Obrera Boliviana ( COB ) y otras organizaciones mantienen desde hace 13 días protestas y bloqueos de caminos para exigir la salida de Paz de la Presidencia, en rechazo a las reformas que su Gobierno busca impulsar mediante un paquete de al menos diez leyes económicas. A estas movilizaciones también se han sumado seguidores del expresidente Evo Morales (2006-2019). Reacción regional El pasado viernes, Ecuador , Argentina , Chile , Costa Rica , Guatemala , Panamá , Paraguay y Perú rechazaron en un comunicado «toda acción orientada a desestabilizar el orden democrático» en Bolivia . Los ocho países llamaron a los actores políticos y sociales en Bolivia a canalizar sus diferencias, privilegiando el diálogo, el respeto a las instituciones y la preservación de la paz social. Al respecto, el canciller boliviano, Fernando Aramayo , destacó que la comunidad internacional «ha respondido con un mensaje claro» de respeto a la democracia «frente a quienes apuestan por el caos, la confrontación y el bloqueo permanente». El conflicto en Bolivia se ha centrado sobre todo en el departamento de La Paz , mientras en el resto del país hay algunos cortes de ruta en las regiones de Oruro (oeste), Cochabamba (centro) y Chuquisaca (sureste).

4 أغاني روك من عام 1975 لا يزال بإمكان كل طفل في السبعينيات أن يغنيها من الذاكرة
content: كانت هناك بعض أغاني الروك القاتلة التي تم إصدارها في عام 1975. وأراهن أن كل طفل في السبعينيات يحب موسيقى الروك يعرف كلمات كل أغنية في قائمتنا أدناه. دعونا نأخذ رحلة عبر حارة الذاكرة ونغوص في بعض كلاسيكيات عام 1975، أليس كذلك؟ “رحلة بطيئة” لفوغات من فيلم “Fool for the City” لا يمكن التغلب على خط الجهير القاتل لنيك جيمسون في “Slow Ride”. الأغنية بأكملها عبارة عن أغنية مربى إلى الأبد. وصلت أغنية Phogat الهارد روك هذه إلى المرتبة 20 سبورة حار 100 ورقم 14 في كندا. “الحب هو الدواء” لموسيقى روكسي من “صفارات الإنذار” من بين الأغاني العديدة التي تشتهر بها موسيقى روكسي، قد تكون أغنية “Love Is the Drug” هي الأكثر رقصًا ومتعة في الغناء معها. حقق فيلم “Love Is the Drug” نجاحًا كبيرًا في المملكة المتحدة، حيث وصل إلى المرتبة الثانية. ومع ذلك، فقد حقق نجاحًا طفيفًا في الولايات المتحدة وبلغ ذروته في المرتبة 30 على مخطط Hot 100. في كلتا الحالتين، إنها أغنية مذهلة. كان هذا أيضًا اسم واحدة من أكثر الألحان تأثيرًا في تشكيل موسيقى الروك أند رول، من تأليف قاعة مشاهير الروك أند رول. “المشي على هذا الطريق” لإيروسميث من “الألعاب في العلية” لم تحظ الأغنية بالكثير من الحب في عام 1975. لكنها اكتسبت أخيرًا بعض الاعتراف من خلال إعادة إصدارها في عام 1976 ولاحقًا في عام 1986 بأسلوب Run-DMC. حتى لو لم تكن على قيد الحياة في السبعينيات، فمن المحتمل أن تتمكن بسهولة من الغناء مع جوقة أغنية “Walk This Way” لإيروسميث. بعد إعادة إصدارها في عام 1976، وصلت أغنية “Walk This Way” إلى المرتبة 10 على مخطط Hot 100. أغنية “أتمنى لو كنت هنا” من أغنية “أتمنى لو كنت هنا” لفرقة بينك فلويد تعتبر أغنية “Wish You Were Here” التي تحكي قصة عضو فرقة Pink Floyd السابق سيد باريت، أغنية مفجعة بعض الشيء، وهي أغنية أساسية بين العديد من عشاق الموسيقى في السبعينيات. وحتى لو لم تكن من أكبر المعجبين بفرقة Pink Floyd في عام 1975، فأنا متأكد من أنك تعرف كلمات هذا الإدخال في قائمة أغاني الروك لدينا. لم يتم إصدار جوهرة البروج روك هذه كأغنية من الألبوم الذي يحمل نفس الاسم، لذلك لم يتم رسمها. لكنها أصبحت منذ ذلك الحين واحدة من أهم الأغاني في ديسكغرافيا بينك فلويد. الصورة عبر غيتي إيماجز رابط المصدر

title: إعفاء الرسوم البلدية يخضع لضوابط قانونية
content: أوضح وكيل وزارة شؤون البلديات الشيخ محمد بن أحمد آل خليفة، ردًا على مقترح مجلس بلدي المحرق بشأن تخفيف الأعباء عن المستثمرين في ظل الظروف الراهنة التي تمر بها المملكة، أن المادة (45) من اللائحة التنفيذية لقانون البلديات الصادرة بالقرار رقم (16) لسنة 2002 نظّمت آلية الإعفاء من الرسوم البلدية وفق ضوابط وإجراءات محددة، بما يضمن تحقيق العدالة والمساواة في التطبيق بين جميع الحالات. وأشار إلى أن الرسوم الحكومية الأخرى تخرج عن نطاق اختصاص المجالس البلدية وفق أحكام قانون البلديات ولائحته التنفيذية، باعتبار أن تنظيم تلك الرسوم يندرج ضمن اختصاص الجهات الحكومية المعنية بها.

Warriors Shutout Lakeview behind Chapura’s Nine-Goal Performance
content: THOMASVILLE– The Brookwood Warriors began their playoff run with a stellar 10-0 win over Lakeview Academy on Wednesday night. The two teams were deadlocked for the first 15 minutes, until Harrison Chapura connected with a strike from just outside the box for the first goal of the game. Four minutes later, Chapura found the back of the net again to give the Warriors a 2-0 lead. Brookwood continued to pack on the pressure as a foul from a few feet outside setup a free kick for the Warriors. Will Stevens sent it in, and the ball deflected off the post. However, Kenji Sun got to the deflection and got it to go. Next, in the 23 rd minute, a foul in the box brought Chapura up for a penalty kick, and the senior got it by the keeper for the first half hat-trick. Chapura added another goal in the 34 th minute on a header from a well-placed pass from Peter DeSantis. Later in the 37 th minute, Chapura tacked on one more goal to put the Warriors ahead 6-0 at the half. Brookwood kept their foot on the gas in the second half, getting on the board again in the 49 th minute on another goal from Chapura. Chapura would score a total of three more times to force the mercy rule, as the Warriors won 10-0. Brookwood will host the semifinal round, as they play against St. Andrew’s on Saturday, May 23 rd with a spot in the championship game on the line.

People should have faith on PM, HM’s assurances on Statehood; word given in Parl matters: LG
content: ‘Omar doing good job, can’t say why he is getting desperate on Statehood’ *Pak planned Pahalgam, Armed Forces achieved targets in 72 hours Sanjeev Pargal JAMMU, May 18: Lieutenant Governor Manoj Sinha today reiterated that the Statehood to Jammu and Kashmir will be restored at an appropriate time which was the commitment of Prime Minister Narendra Modi and Home Minister Amit Shah and the people should have faith in their words. Follow the Daily Excelsior channel on WhatsApp “The Prime Minister as well as the Home Minister had stated that Delimitation in Jammu and Kashmir will be followed by elections (Assembly) and restoration of Statehood at an appropriate time. The Assembly elections were a historic with not even a single stone pelting incident reported and political parties continued campaign till late in the night. There was a huge turnout and no re-poll was ordered,” Sinha said in an interview with a national news channel tonight. He said the people should have faith on what the Prime Minister and the Home Minister have said. “Those who have been members of the Parliament know what the assurance given in the House means. The people should have faith in what the Prime Minister has assured to the people and the Home Minister has said in the Parliament,” he said. “Very good”, Sinha quipped in response to a question on how Chief Minister Omar Abdullah was working. “Can’t say” was the LG’s reply to another question on why he (Omar) was getting desperate on the Statehood. On what changes Jammu and Kashmir has witnessed during his 6-year tenure, Sinha said the people of Jammu and Kashmir have been living their life freely...peace has been established...development is apace and economy has improved and is surging ahead. “When I came, Jammu and Kashmir Bank was in the losses ranging between Rs 1300 cr to Rs 1400 crore. Now, the institution is in the profit of Rs 2000 crore. Number of peace stakeholders has gone up. There is boom in tourism, agriculture and allied sectors,” he said. To a question on the Prime Minister’s acceptability especially in the Kashmir Valley, the Lieutenant Governor said it was there earlier also but now it has gone up. Vote is a separate issue but the people say they have never seen such development which has been done under Narendra Modi’s leadership with train running from Kashmir to Kanyakumari; National Highways and Expressways being constructed and many other works taken up. On first anniversary of Operation Sindoor, Sinha said...

title: Santee Cooper Opens Competitive Bid Process for Next Wave of Solar Power
content: MONCKS CORNER, S.C. — Santee Cooper has launched its 2026 Solar Request for Proposals, inviting qualified developers to submit bids for new utility‐scale solar projects that would come online across its service territory through the end of the decade. The solicitation, released May 11, marks the latest step in the state‐owned utility’s push to expand affordable, renewable energy resources as South Carolina’s population — and energy demand — continues to grow. Central Electric Power Cooperative will participate in evaluating the proposals and may join Santee Cooper as a power purchaser under long‐term Power Purchase Agreements. The RFP seeks binding offers for all or a portion of the energy and related attributes from new solar photovoltaic facilities, with commercial operation preferred by December 31, 2030. SUBSCRIBE: Get the latest Berkeley County, SC news delivered to your inbox . “As South Carolina continues to grow, so does the demand for a diverse energy mix that balances cost, reliability and environmental benefits,” said Jimmy Staton, Santee Cooper President and CEO. “This RFP represents another important step in expanding our generation portfolio with cost‐effective renewable resources that will help serve customers for decades to come.” READ MORE l Santee Cooper Unveils Rate Hike Plan, Invites Customers to Weigh In How Developers Can Participate Developers must submit all required forms and documentation through The Energy Authority’s RFP Marketplace by July 6. To be eligible, developers must have already submitted a transmission interconnection request with Santee Cooper as of March 31, 2026. The utility said the competitive bidding process is designed to ensure cost‐effective solar additions while supporting long‐term planning for the state’s energy future. The post Santee Cooper Opens Competitive Bid Process for Next Wave of Solar Power first appeared on The Berkeley Observer .

Gray Collegiate Academy boys soccer back in state final
content: (Photo by Talon-Gray Collegiate Academy) – Gray Collegiate boys soccer team By Thomas Grant Jr. For the fourth time in five years, Gray Collegiate Academy boys’ soccer in playing for a state championship. The War Eagles will face Southside Friday at Memorial Stadium for the Class 4A title. It will kick off following the girls’ soccer final between Bishop England and A.C. Flora which starts at 4 p.m. The Lady Bishops defeated Gray Collegiate Academy in overtime 2-1 in the Lower State final played last Friday. The Lady Bishops were seeking their first-ever appearance in the championship. Vanessa and Victoria Coleman, Lydia Kiker and Ruth Ann McCarty were named to the S.C. High School Soccer Coaches Association’s Class 4A All-State team. Meanwhile, Gray Collegiate Academy boys earned their head coach Kevin Heise a seventh state title appearance with a dramatic 0-0 (4-1 on penalty kicks) victory over Bishop England Saturday at home. “I’ve got a nine-month-old,” Heise said. “I lost more sleep because of my soccer team than I did from her keeping me up at night. It’s amazing and I was frustrated. Thirty-five, 36 years of doing this, you think you’ve seen it all. I’ve never seen anything like a January and February we had. I just never thought we’d get it on track. “But then sometime the second week in March, the worm turned a little bit. The belief and the commitment these guys have had in each other, the belief, the commitment, the desire, the discipline. all those things fell in place the last 9-10 weeks.” Gray Collegiate Academy has won seven straight matches since suffering back-to-back shutout losses to Bishop England on April 17 and Ashley Ridge the next day. In the rematch, the War Eagles battled the Bishops through two scoreless periods and four overtimes before breaking through on penalty kicks. After both teams scored opening kicks, Gray Collegiate outscored Bishop England 3-0 to win the match. All-State selections David Andrade and Andres Campo (who were joined by Jason Gonzalez), Jacob Gardner and Joshua Perez accounted for the goals and goalkeeper Charlie Petroff made the two stops to clinch the Lower State title. “It is a dream come true,” Petroff said of going to the state championship. “The beginning of the season it was such a question mark. But now it’s at the point where we’ve come going to state. It’s unbelievable and to be back there. I was there my freshman, sophomore year, missed it my junior year. So, it’s really great to be back and...

Gaúchos também reforçam a comissão técnica do Brasil na Copa do Mundo
content: Além dos jogadores Alisson Becker, Roger Ibañez e Raphinha, o Rio Grande do Sul terá outros quatro representantes na Copa do Mundo de 2026: Marquinhos Trocourt, Cláudio Taffarel, Lucas de Oliveira e Rodrigo Caetano, integrantes da comissão técnica e da estrutura da Confederação Brasileira de Futebol (CBF). Marquinhos Trocourt, de Novo Hamburgo, vai para sua segunda Copa do Mundo Foto: Rafael Ribeiro/CBF Marquinhos Trocourt, de Novo Hamburgo Natural de Novo Hamburgo, Marquinhos Trocourt integra a comissão técnica da Seleção Brasileira como auxiliar de preparação de goleiros. Ex-goleiro profissional, atuou por clubes como Novo Hamburgo, Inter e Náutico antes de iniciar a carreira fora das quatro linhas. Como preparador, construiu trajetória em grandes clubes do futebol brasileiro, passando por São Paulo, Flamengo, Botafogo e Inter, além do Gamba Osaka, do Japão. Na Seleção Brasileira, trabalha ao lado de Taffarel na preparação dos goleiros e participou da comissão técnica do Brasil na Copa do Mundo do Catar, em 2022. Taffarel, uma lenda viva Referência histórica da Seleção Brasileira, Taffarel disputará mais uma Copa do Mundo agora como preparador de goleiros. Natural de Santa Rosa, o ex-goleiro é uma das figuras mais respeitadas da história do futebol brasileiro. Com a camisa da Seleção, Taffarel participou das Copas do Mundo de 1990, 1994 e 1998. Foi protagonista no tetracampeonato conquistado nos Estados Unidos, especialmente na final contra a Itália, quando defendeu um dos pênaltis na disputa que garantiu o título mundial ao Brasil. Taffarel é o responsável pela preparação dos goleiros Foto: Rafael Ribeiro/CBF Após encerrar a carreira, passou a trabalhar na preparação de goleiros e participou diretamente da evolução de atletas como Alisson e Ederson. Aos 60 anos, chega a mais um Mundial mantendo protagonismo nos bastidores da Seleção. Diretor de seleções Natural de Santo Antônio da Patrulha, Rodrigo Caetano é o principal dirigente do futebol masculino da CBF. Ex-jogador e consolidado como executivo no futebol brasileiro, foi confirmado em 2024 como coordenador executivo geral das seleções masculinas e recentemente renovou contrato com a entidade até 2030. Rodrigo é responsável pelo planejamento, gestão e reestruturação do futebol masculino da CBF, atuando diretamente na ligação entre a comissão técnica, os jogadores e a diretoria da entidade. Rodrigo Caetano, coordenador executivo geral das...

La víctima fue identificada como María Esther Ramos , quien recibió múltiples heridas de arma blanca presuntamente ocasionadas por un hombre solo identificado como “El Rubio”. El Consultorio del Once: Especialista revela que la lactancia materna es clave para el desarrollo y la salud del bebé
content: Este lunes 18 de mayo del 2026, estuvo presente en El Consultorio del Once la pediatra Astrid Sabonge. Destacó la importancia de la lactancia materna; la catalogó como el alimento más completo para el recién nacido, subrayando que no solo nutre, sino que también protege y fortalece el sistema inmunológico del bebé desde sus primeras horas de vida. La especialista explicó que la lactancia materna contiene todos los nutrientes esenciales, como ser proteínas, grasas, vitaminas y carbohidratos necesarios para el crecimiento adecuado del bebé. Además, indico que aporta anticuerpos que ayudan a prevenir enfermedades respiratorias, digestivas y alergias. Enfatizó que el proceso debe iniciar en la primera hora de vida, momento en el que el bebé recibe el calostro, una leche rica en defensas que resulta fundamental durante los primeros días. Duración recomendada y adaptación natural Según la doctora, la lactancia materna exclusiva debe mantenerse durante los primeros seis meses, tal como lo recomienda la Organización Mundial de la Salud, aunque puede prolongarse hasta los dos años o más, dependiendo de la comodidad de la madre y el bebé. Asimismo, aclaró que la composición de la leche cambia con el tiempo, adaptándose a las necesidades del niño conforme crece. Mitos y realidades sobre la producción de leche La pediatra desmintió creencias comunes, como que el tamaño de los senos determina la cantidad de leche. Señaló que la producción depende principalmente de la succión del bebé, la hidratación de la madre y la técnica adecuada. También aseguró que todas las mujeres tienen la capacidad de producir leche, siempre que exista estimulación constante. Frecuencia El Consultorio del Once: Especialista alerta sobre la onicomicosis y llama a la prevención en pacientes diabéticos Alimentación y señales del bebé La experta indicó que los recién nacidos suelen alimentarse cada dos a tres horas, y que no todo llanto significa hambre. Recomendó observar señales como el aumento de peso y la cantidad de pañales mojados, al menos seis al día, para confirmar que el bebé está bien alimentado. Beneficios para la madre y el bebé La especialista resaltó que la lactancia no solo beneficia al bebé, sino también a la madre. Entre los principales beneficios mencionó: Para el bebé: Fortalece el sistema inmune, mejora la digestión y reduce el riesgo de enfermedades a largo plazo. Para la madre: Ayuda a reducir el estrés, favorece la...

title: Norway stood firmly with India during Pahalgam attack: PM
content: Modi receives highest civilian honour OSLO, May 18: India and Norway have firmed up a Green Strategic Partnership, as Prime Minister Narendra Modi and his Norwegian counterpart Jonas Gahr Store held wide-ranging talks during which they called for resolving the tensions in Ukraine and West Asia through dialogue and diplomacy. Follow the Daily Excelsior channel on WhatsApp The two leaders held talks on Monday focusing on expanding cooperation in areas such as clean energy, climate resilience, blue economy, green shipping, digital technology, space and Arctic research. “India and Norway both believe in a rules-based order, dialogue, and diplomacy. We are in agreement that no issue can be resolved through military conflict,” Modi said in his televised media statement after the talks. “Whether it is Ukraine or West Asia, we support and will continue to support, every effort toward an early end to the conflicts and the restoration of peace,” he said. Delving into India-Norway ties, Modi said the relations are being elevated to a Green Strategic Partnership. “Through this strategic partnership, our companies will develop global solutions across sectors – from clean energy to climate resilience, and from the blue economy to green shipping – by combining India’s scale, speed, and talent with Norway’s technology and capital,” he said. The Prime Minister said the ‘Green Strategic Partnership’ will be beneficial for the entire world. The Prime Minister also touched upon the upswing in India-Europe ties and described it as a “golden era” of the relationship. “Today, the world is passing through a period of instability and uncertainty. Whether it is Ukraine or West Asia, many parts of the world continue to face conflict. At such a time, India and Europe are entering a new golden era in their relationship.” In his remarks, Modi thanked Norway for supporting India after last year’s Pahalgam terror attack that killed 26 people, mostly tourists. “I was scheduled to visit Norway last year, but the trip had to be postponed due to the terrorist attack in Pahalgam. During that difficult time, Norway stood firmly with India against terrorism, reflecting the strength of our friendship,” he said. “Today, as I visit Norway, I express my heartfelt gratitude for that solidarity,” he added. In his remarks, Modi also underlined the need for reform of global institutions to deal with emerging global challenges. “We are also in agreement that reform of global institutions is essential...

title: O que vai acontecer na estreia de Quem Ama Cuida? veja detalhes
content: A mocinha Adriana viverá uma verdadeira odisseia para salvar a sua família das águas no capítulo de estreia. Foto: Reprodução/TV Globo. A nova novela das nove, “ Quem Ama Cuida “, estreia nesta segunda-feira (18) e promete fisgar o telespectador logo de cara. Assim, no ínicio da trama, a protagonista Adriana (Letícia Colin) enfrentará uma sequência de tragédias em um único dia. Letícia Colin e Antônio Fagundes em ‘Quem Ama, Cuida’ Manoella Mello/Globo Letícia Colin interpretará a protagonista Adriana em Quem Ama Cuida. Foto: Divulgação/TV Globo. Isabel Teixeira é a grande vilã Pilar em Quem Ama Cuida, a nova novela das 9 — Foto: Globo/ Manoella Mello A família Brandão: poder, ressentimento e laços corroídos pelo dinheiro Brigitte (Tata Werneck), Ingrid (Agatha Moreira) , Mau Mau (João Victor Gonçalves) e Pilar (Isabel Teixeira) em Quem Ama Cuida — Foto: Globo Ulisses (Alexandre Borges) e Pilar (Isabel Teixeira) em Quem Ama Cuida — Foto: Globo/ Manoella Mello Demissão e caos na cidade O dia tinha tudo para ser de festa, pois Adriana completa o seu primeiro ano de casamento com Carlos ( Jesuíta Barbosa ). No entanto, o pesadelo da protagonista começa cedo. A fisioterapeuta chega para trabalhar na clínica e descobre que foi demitida. Logo depois, uma tempestade violenta atinge a cidade de São Paulo e paralisa as ruas. A luta pela sobrevivência O desespero toma conta quando a jovem tenta voltar para casa. Por causa disso, Adriana precisa enfrentar a forte enchente com a água batendo na cintura para tentar salvar a sua família. Ela consegue encontrar os parentes ilhados em cima de uma kombi. Sendo assim, o marido, a mãe, o avô e o irmão da protagonista são resgatados com a ajuda de um barqueiro. Uma tragédia marca o começo de Quem Ama Cuida Após garantir a segurança da própria família em um abrigo, o casal decide voltar para ajudar outras vítimas da enchente. Apesar disso, um ato de heroísmo termina da pior forma possível no meio do alagamento. Carlos acaba sendo arrastado violentamente por uma correnteza. Por fim, Adriana entra em choque absoluto ao ver o marido desaparecer nas águas escuras. Estagiário sob supervisão de Clayton Matos O post O que vai acontecer na estreia de Quem Ama Cuida? veja detalhes apareceu primeiro em Diário do Pará .

Los pioneros de la secuenciación rápida de ADN, Premio Princesa de Investigación
content: Los químicos británicos David Klenerman y Shankar Balasubramanian y el biofísico francés Pascal Mayer, pioneros en el desarrollo de la tecnología que permite la secuenciación de ADN de forma rápida, precisa, a bajo coste y a gran escala, fueron galardonados este miércoles en España con el Premio Princesa de Asturias de Investigación Científica y Técnica 2026. Este método, que posibilita que la secuenciación del genoma humano pueda hacerse en un solo día con un coste de menos de mil dólares -para hacerlo en el año 2000 se precisaron diez años y más de mil millones de dólares -, permitió importantes avances en el campo de la biomedicina, ya que se utiliza en el diagnóstico y atención del cáncer, enfermedades raras e infecciosas o pruebas prenatales, y en el de la biología o ecología. La técnica, presentada en el año 2000 tras una década y media de investigación, también fue decisiva en la lucha frente al covid, puesto que ha permitido identificar nuevas cepas de coronavirus y otros patógenos y posibilitó la creación de múltiples vacunas que se administran en todo el mundo. La secuenciación de ADN de nueva generación (NGS) se convirtió en el método de secuenciación genética más utilizado en el mundo, revolucionó la investigación en biología celular, biomedicina, medicina forense y ecología, abrió campos de investigación nuevos como el estudio del microbioma humano y dio lugar al primer secuenciador de nueva generación (MiSeq). Klenerman (Reino Unido, 1959) y Balasubramanian (Chennai, la India, 1966), profesores en la Universidad de Cambridge, inventaron juntos este método y cofundaron a finales del pasado siglo una empresa para que su tecnología estuviese al alcance de todo el mundo, actualmente Solexa-Illumina. A ella también contribuyó el biofísico Pascal Mayer (Mosela, Francia, 1963), profesor asociado de la Universidad de Estraburgo que ha desarrollado su carrera en empresas privadas y que ideó un método de amplificación superficial del ADN que es clave para la secuenciación rápida del ADN. El método NGS pasa por dividir el ADN en numerosos fragmentos pequeños que se inmovilizan en la superficie de un chip en la que, tras ser amplificados, son descodificados mediante técnicas de fluorescencia para, posteriormente, ser ensamblados mediante un programa informático capaz de secuenciar miles de millones de fragmentos en paralelo, hasta lograr la secuencia completa. Inspiración para los jóvenes...

Rising costs are pushing Canada’s restaurant industry towards a breaking point
content: Canadian restaurants have survived years of inflation, labour shortages and supply chain disruptions — but industry experts say the latest sales figures point to a more troubling reality: operating a restaurant in Canada is becoming increasingly untenable. An opinion piece published by the director of the Agri-Food Analytics Lab at Dalhousie University, Sylvain Charlebois, shows new data highlighted by Restaurants Canada shows the industry is facing mounting economic pressure as food, fuel, labour and operating costs continue to climb. “A lot more people are putting more money into their cars,” said Charlebois. “In fact, the average family right now will have to spend $1,500 more on fuel this year related to transportation.” Charlebois says instability in the Middle East has pushed oil prices higher, while fertilizer markets remain volatile, both factors increasing costs throughout the food supply chain. He says at the same time, many Canadians are cutting back on discretionary spending, including dining out. “With so much affordability pressure for restaurant owners and consumers, many operators are no longer talking about profitability and are focusing more on survival,” Charlebois said. Industry projections suggest Canada could see a net loss of roughly 4,000 restaurants this year. “We estimated that in January we had 87,000 restaurants in Canada,” said Charlebois. “That number will drop to 83,000. Some restaurants will open, but way more restaurants will be closing.” “A bag of onions has gone up 30 per cent. A box of tomatoes has gone up 50 per cent, so it’s been really difficult.” -Demian Merino, owner of Saxe Point Public House. For restaurant owners like Merino, the challenge now is not just serving good food, it’s finding a way to stay afloat without pricing customers out. “It’s definitely been difficult... there’s been rising costs all across the board,” said Merino. READ MORE: ‘Break-even environment’: Save BC Restaurants campaign aims to help provinces restaurant industry The post Rising costs are pushing Canada’s restaurant industry towards a breaking point appeared first on CHEK .

Israeli flag attack ad prompts antisemitism charge in PA state race — yet boosts the Jewish candidate
content: Bradley Merkl-Gump, a former middle school social studies teacher and school board member running for Pennsylvania state senate in Tuesday’s primary, is seeking a state job that has little to do with global politics. Yet voters received campaign mail plastered with an Israeli flag, portraying him as the candidate of an “Israel first” political machine. The mail, paid for by the Protecting Our Democracy PAC, casts Merkl-Gump as the “hand-picked candidate of the corporate, Israel-first Democratic party boss and insiders” and a “party boss and special interest puppet.” It pictures him in the company of Pennsylvania Sen. John Fetterman, who is a stalwart Israel ally, and — embellished with the Israeli flag — Steve Santarsiero, a Jewish Democratic state senator from a neighboring district who endorsed Merkl-Gump. The campaign mail sent to voters. Screenshot of Bucks County Democratic Committee Santarsiero, who converted and has a Jewish family, has twice introduced legislation to withhold funding from any Pennsylvania colleges that divest from Israel, but he is a relative moderate on Israel: He has also said he does “not support either Benjamin Netanyahu or his right-wing government,” and does “support the creation of a Palestinian state.” Merkl-Gump took to Instagram earlier this month to condemn the flyers, accusing the PAC of “targeting his Jewish faith” and declaring “This has gone too far.” He has also has hinted at concerns about the anti-divestment resolution, saying in a recent debate : “We should never be preventing any institution in this state from using its free speech.” He did not respond to the Forward ’s request for comment. Complicating the picture: the candidate Protecting Our Democracy PAC is promoting in the mailer, Lehigh County Controller Mark Pinsley, is Jewish. He is also a vocal voice criticizing Israel. The flyer notes that Pinsley “spoke out against Netanyahu’s war crimes.” Like many in his Democratic Party, Pinsley has called Israel’s military campaign in Gaza a genocide . Pinsley says he sees the mail as pushback on Israel-related policy rather than animus toward Jews. “To me, it looks like a sharp criticism of a specific vote on a specific bill,” Pinsley said in an interview with the Forward , referring to Santarsiero’s anti-BDS legislation. Pinsley noted that Pennsylvania Sen. John Fetterman, who is not Jewish but is one of the most outspoken Democrats in support of Israel, also appears in the flyer. Still, Pinsley conceded that...

IMDIS acerca valoraciones con neuropediatra a familias de La Ribera y zona norte
content: Con el objetivo de acercar atención especializada a familias que viven lejos de la cabecera municipal, el Instituto Municipal para el Desarrollo e Inclusión de Personas con Discapacidad ( IMDIS Los Cabos ) realizó una jornada de valoraciones con neuropediatra en la delegación de La Ribera y comunidades de la zona norte. La jornada fue encabezada por el director general de IMDIS Los Cabos , Fernando Altamirano Valdez, con la participación del neuropediatra Carlos Montes La Huerta , quien brindó atención a 20 niñas, niños y adolescentes del municipio. Detección temprana de neurodivergencias Estas valoraciones con neuropediatra buscan detectar de forma oportuna posibles neurodivergencias, discapacidades o trastornos neurológicos . La detección temprana permite desarrollar tratamientos y herramientas que contribuyan a mejorar la calidad de vida de pacientes y familias. Lee más: Basquetbol sobre ruedas impulsa comunidad e inclusión en Los Cabos El director del instituto agradeció la participación del especialista y destacó que estas jornadas responden a la instrucción de acercar los servicios a las comunidades. “Gracias al respaldo y la encomienda de nuestro alcalde Christian Agúndez de acercar los servicios a donde más se necesitan, hoy pudimos llegar a la delegación de La Ribera y comunidades cercanas de la zona norte, brindando atención a 20 niñas y niños a través de estas valoraciones especializadas”, expresó Fernando Altamirano. Atención especializada fuera de la cabecera municipal Con estas acciones, IMDIS Los Cabos reiteró su compromiso de impulsar la inclusión , el acceso a servicios especializados y el bienestar de las personas con discapacidad y sus familias en todo el municipio. Las jornadas de valoraciones con neuropediatra forman parte de la estrategia municipal para llevar servicios médicos a comunidades alejadas y reducir barreras de acceso a la salud . Únete AQUÍ a nuestro canal de WhatsApp TRIBUNA DE MÉXICO Síguenos en Facebook, nos encuentras como Tribuna de México El cargo IMDIS acerca valoraciones con neuropediatra a familias de La Ribera y zona norte apareció primero en Tribuna de México .

title: Arde remolque en lote de venta de autos; fuego se propaga a un cuarto y a otro vehículo
content: Un incendio se registró esta tarde en un lote de venta de autos ubicado en la colonia Campesina, al poniente de esta ciudad capital. El hecho sucedió sobre la avenida Teófilo Borunda y calle Espuelitas, a donde acudieron elementos del Cuerpo de Bomberos y agentes policíacos. Según el reporte, el incendio comenzó en un remolque y debido al viento, el fuego se propagó hacia un cuarto donde guardaban madera, además de que también alcanzó a un vehículo en desuso. A pesar de lo fuerte del incendio, no se registraron personas lesionadas, sólo daños materiales.

title: CIC raps J&K Revenue Deptt, Kupwara DC Office for casual RTI handling
content: Jt Financial Commissioner order termed erroneous, absurd *Show-cause notices for delayed replies, procedural lapses Mohinder Verma JAMMU, May 18: In a sharp rebuke to Public Authorities in the Union Territory of Jammu and Kashmir over casual handling of RTI matters, the Central Information Commission (CIC) has issued show-cause notices to officials of the Revenue Department and DC Office Kupwara, flagging delayed replies, missing records, non-appearance during hearings and deemed refusal of information. Follow the Daily Excelsior channel on WhatsApp The Commission also strongly criticised the First Appellate Authority (FAA), observing that the order passed by it was grossly erroneous and absurd and had effectively rendered the statutory remedy of First Appeal futile. The first case arose from an RTI application filed by one Rahul Singh seeking details regarding sanctioned strength, vacant posts and recruitment status of Naib Tehsildars in the Jammu and Kashmir Revenue Department. The applicant had also sought a certified copy of an earlier RTI reply allegedly stating that 86 posts of Naib Tehsildars were vacant, including 35 in Jammu region. As no reply was furnished within the stipulated time, the applicant approached the First Appellate Authority (FAA)/Joint Financial Commissioner (Revenue). During the hearing before the FAA, the Public Information Officer reportedly stated that the available information would be provided to the applicant. However, instead of deciding the appeal in accordance with the RTI Act, the FAA directed the PIO to hear the applicant and go through the RTI application. Taking serious note of this, Chief Information Commissioner observed, “the FAA had treated the RTI application as a grievance petition rather than a statutory information request under the RTI Act”. The CIC observed that there was no material on record to show that the RTI application had been replied to within the statutory time frame and held that it amounted to “deemed refusal” under Section 7(2) of the RTI Act. The Commission further noted that the information was eventually supplied only after notice of registration of the Second Appeal was issued by the Commission. The order further recorded that the CPIO neither explained the delay nor responded properly to the Commission’s hearing notice. Even during the hearing, the representative of the CPIO merely referred to documents placed on record without offering any substantial explanation. Directing the CPIO to...

title: Boletos para México vs Ghana en Puebla alcanzan 80% de venta rumbo al Mundial 2026
content: La expectativa por el encuentro entre la Selección Mexicana y Ghana en Puebla sigue creciendo. El coordinador de gabinete, José Luis García Parra, informó que la venta de boletos para el partido del próximo 22 de mayo ya alcanzó el 80 por ciento , reflejando el interés de los aficionados poblanos por uno de los encuentros previos al arranque del Mundial 2026 . El funcionario confirmó además que la selección africana ya se encuentra en territorio poblano realizando entrenamientos en las instalaciones del Parque España II , mientras que el combinado mexicano arribará a finales de esta semana para cerrar su preparación rumbo a la justa internacional que comenzará el próximo 11 de junio . Ante la alta asistencia proyectada en el Estadio Cuauhtémoc , el Gobierno estatal anunció un operativo coordinado entre los tres órdenes de gobierno para garantizar la seguridad de asistentes, jugadores y cuerpos técnicos durante el evento deportivo. Por otra parte, García Parra destacó el impulso que recibirá la artesanía poblana elaborada en Naupan , luego de que la empresa Adidas México contactara directamente a las artesanas Petra y Cata para participar en el bordado de un jersey de la Selección Mexicana rumbo al Mundial 2026 . El coordinador explicó que, aunque no hubo intervención gubernamental en el acuerdo comercial, sí existen programas culturales destinados a fortalecer el trabajo artesanal en la región. Entre las acciones previstas destaca una inversión para rehabilitar la Casa de Cultura de Naupan , mejorar sanitarios e instalaciones y ofrecer espacios más dignos para las mujeres artesanas. 📌 Esto también te va a interesar, dale click 📌 Masacre en Tehuitzingo: aparece video del principal sospechoso antes del crimen The post Boletos para México vs Ghana en Puebla alcanzan 80% de venta rumbo al Mundial 2026 appeared first on Diario 24 Horas Puebla .

Brands must communicate AI use openly to maintain consumer trust, says Penquin MD
content: Brands must communicate AI use openly or risk losing consumer trust Companies deploying artificial intelligence face a critical gap between what their systems can do and how customers perceive them. Silence on AI adoption can damage reputation as much as poorly handled rollouts, according to communications experts. The problem is straightforward: consumers worry about job losses, data privacy, misinformation, and the erosion of human creativity. These concerns dominate public conversation. When brands use AI without explaining why, they create a vacuum that assumptions fill-and those assumptions tend to be negative. Perception management must become a strategic priority, not an afterthought. This means proactively shaping the narrative rather than reacting to criticism after the fact. What transparent communication looks like Brands should clearly state why they're using AI, how it benefits customers, and where human oversight remains in place. This approach reassures audiences while demonstrating innovation. Authenticity matters more than polish. Consumers increasingly recognize attempts to obscure or over-sell AI capabilities. Acknowledging both benefits and limitations builds far more credibility than positioning AI as a flawless solution. Demonstrating responsible AI use-through ethical guidelines, transparent data practices, and a human-first approach-shifts perception from fear to trust. Companies can lead by educating audiences about AI rather than letting anxiety drive the conversation. The role of storytelling AI is often presented as abstract or technical. Strong, human-centred storytelling bridges that gap and makes the technology feel relatable rather than intimidating. For communications professionals, this represents both a challenge and an opportunity. AI for PR & Communications now requires understanding not just how to deploy the technology, but how to build trust around it. The real competitive advantage Managing AI perception is not about spin-it's about stewardship. Brands that succeed will recognize AI as a cultural shift, not just a technical one. Culture is shaped by how people feel, and thoughtful communication protects and strengthens brand reputation. In an environment of rapid change, trust remains the most valuable asset brands possess.

title: Amy Sherald Comes Home: “American Sublime” Opens at the High Museum
content: Michelle LaVaughn Robinson Obama, 2018 Oil on Linen. Photo by Noah Washington/The Atlanta Voice Standing before an Amy Sherald painting is an exercise in aspiration. Her canvases, saturated with soft pastels and bold chromatic contrasts, construct an American landscape where Black subjects exist not at the margins of the imagination, but squarely at its center. On May 15, the High Museum of Art opens “Amy Sherald: American Sublime,” a mid-career retrospective featuring more than 35 paintings made between 2007 and 2024. It is the largest exhibition of Sherald’s work to date, and Atlanta is its final stop. The road to the High was anything but straightforward. The exhibition, organized by the San Francisco Museum of Modern Art, was originally slated to close its national tour at the National Portrait Gallery in Washington, D.C. That changed after the Trump administration signed an executive order directing Smithsonian institutions to remove what it called “un-American content” from their exhibitions and programming. “Amy was concerned that her work could potentially be censored,” said Angelica Arbelaez, assistant curator of modern and contemporary art at the High, “and that, for her, was something that she did not want for this exhibition.” Sherald made the difficult decision to cancel the D.C. stop. Museums across the country moved quickly to fill the vacancy, and the High secured the fourth and final slot following the Baltimore Museum of Art. The announcement came in September 2024 at the museum’s Driskell Gala, where High Director Rand Suffolk made it official. What followed was roughly six months of coordination between the High, SFMOMA, Sherald’s studio, and her gallery, Hauser & Wirth. Breonna Taylor, 2020, Oil on Linen. Phot by Noah Washington/The Atlanta Voice Atlanta’s connection to Sherald runs deep. She was born in Columbus, Georgia, and attended Clark Atlanta University, earning her BFA in 1997. The High has honored her before, awarding her the David C. Driskell Prize in African American Art and Art History in 2018. Her portrait of former First Lady Michelle Obama appeared at the museum as part of the 2022 Obama Portraits Tour, and a diptych of two motorcyclists was included in the 2024 “Giants” exhibition drawn from the collection of Alicia Keys and Swizz Beatz. “American Sublime” brings that history into focus. The exhibition presents the Michelle Obama portrait alongside dozens of other works, many featuring ordinary Black Americans rendered...

Paracas: Colegio Carlos Notiega Jiménez participó de importante Ecotrueque
content: Alumnos de los niveles inicial, primaria y secundaria de la institución educativa 22716 Carlos Noriega Jiménez participaron activamente en el proyecto Ecotrueque, significativa iniciativa instaurada en 2005 por la UNESCO con el propósito de promover el reciclaje y la responsabilidad ambienta La actividad fue organizada por la Gerencia de Servicios a la Ciudad de la municipalidad de Paracas, a cargo de Ángel Soto, quien busca generar conciencia sobre el cuidado del medio ambiente y educar a la comunidad respecto a la importancia de reducir, reutilizar y reciclar materiales para preservar nuestra naturaleza. Al final de la jornada se logró recolectar 355.42 kg de materiales en desuso y los premios por esta acción ecológica fueron entregados a los estudiantes destacados con el fin de motivarlos en la práctica de aprovechar los desechos domésticos, fomentando así una cultura que contribuya a evitar la saturación de los rellenos sanitarios. (Felipe Olivares Mozo) La entrada Paracas: Colegio Carlos Notiega Jiménez participó de importante Ecotrueque se publicó primero en Diario La Opinión Ica .

HC grants interim bail to Rashid for father’s funeral
content: Excelsior Correspondent/PTI NEW DELHI, May 18: The Delhi High Court on Monday granted interim bail till June 2 to Baramulla MP Sheikh Abdul Rashid alias Engineer Rashid, who is lodged in prison in a terror-funding case, following his father’s demise. Follow the Daily Excelsior channel on WhatsApp A bench of Justices Prathiba M Singh and Madhu Jain said during the interim bail period, Rashid shall always be accompanied by at least two police officials in plainclothes, who shall remain with him from the beginning of the journey from Tihar Jail until his return from Srinagar. Click here to watch video He shall be permitted to visit the burial ground or any other place of worship, but shall not be permitted to move anywhere else from his residence in Srinagar and Langate, the bench ordered. Rashid sought interim bail on the grounds that his father, who was undergoing treatment at AIIMS, passed away on the intervening night of Sunday and Monday. Rashid’s counsel, advocate Vikhyat Oberoi, said interim bail was needed to conduct the burial, carry out the customary rites and perform various other ceremonies. “Accordingly, due to the demise of the appellant’s father, interim bail is granted to the appellant until 2nd June, 2026,” the court ordered. “Immediately, upon expiry of the bail period, the appellant shall surrender before the concerned Jail Superintendent and shall be brought back to Tihar Jail, Delhi,” it added. The court further ordered that any meeting between Rashid and persons other than his immediate family members shall take place only in the presence of the police officials and that he could use only one mobile number, which would be given to the investigating officer and kept “switched on” at all times. It also directed Rashid not to contact any witnesses or their family members or indulge in any criminal or unlawful activity or leave the country without its prior permission. Meanwhile, in Srinagar, Chief Minister Omar Abdullah has expressed deep grief and sorrow over the passing away of Khazir Mohammad Sheikh, father of Member of Parliament Er. Rashid and MLA Khursheed Ahmad Sheikh, who breathed his last at AIIMS, New Delhi, after a prolonged illness. Khazir Mohammad Sheikh was 85 years old. The Chief Minister conveyed his heartfelt condolences to the bereaved family and prayed for eternal peace to the departed soul. He also prayed for strength and courage to the family to bear this irreparable loss. The post HC grants interim bail to Rashid for...

title: ទោះបីជាមានការសង្ស័យលើកាយសម្បទារបស់គាត់ក៏ដោយ Neymar ត្រូវបានជ្រើសរើសសម្រាប់ក្រុមបាល់ទាត់ពិភពលោករបស់ប្រេស៊ីល
content: RIO DE JANEIRO – Neymar ត្រូវបានបញ្ចូលក្នុងក្រុមបាល់ទាត់ពិភពលោករបស់ប្រេស៊ីលកាលពីថ្ងៃចន្ទ ដែលជាជម្រើសដែលអ្នកវិភាគក្នុងស្រុកជាច្រើន និងអតីតកីឡាករបាល់ទាត់គិតថាមិនទំនងប៉ុន្មានថ្ងៃមុននេះ។ ខ្សែប្រយុទ្ធនឹងបង្ហាញខ្លួនក្នុងការប្រកួតបាល់ទាត់ពិភពលោកលើកទីបួនរបស់គាត់។ Neymar វ័យ 34 ឆ្នាំគឺជាអ្នកស៊ុតបញ្ចូលទីច្រើនជាងគេបំផុតគ្រប់ពេលរបស់ប្រទេសប្រេស៊ីលដោយស៊ុតបញ្ចូលទីបាន 79 គ្រាប់ ប៉ុន្តែបានព្យាយាមត្រលប់ទៅរកទម្រង់លេងវិញចាប់តាំងពីការរហែកសរសៃពួររបស់គាត់ក្នុងខែតុលាឆ្នាំ 2023 ។ គាត់បានលេងចំនួន 8 ប្រកួតសម្រាប់ Santos ក្នុងឆ្នាំនេះ ដោយស៊ុតបញ្ចូលទីបាន 4 គ្រាប់ និង assist ពីរ។ លោក Carlo Ancelotti គ្រូបង្វឹកប្រេស៊ីលបាននិយាយនៅក្នុងសន្និសីទសារព័ត៌មាននៅទីក្រុង Rio de Janeiro ថា “គាត់បានធ្វើឱ្យប្រសើរឡើងនូវកាយសម្បទារបស់គាត់ គាត់នឹងក្លាយជាកីឡាករដ៏សំខាន់ម្នាក់នៅក្នុងការប្រកួតបាល់ទាត់ពិភពលោកនេះ” ។ គ្រូ​បង្វឹក​រូប​នេះ​បាន​បន្ថែម​ថា លោក​ចូល​ចិត្ត​កីឡាករ​ដែល​មាន​បទ​ពិសោធ​សម្រាប់​កន្លែង​ខ្លះ​ក្នុង​ក្រុម​របស់​លោក រួម​ទាំង Neymar ផង​ដែរ។ លោក Ancelotti បាននិយាយថា “គាត់នៅតែអាចកែលម្អកាយសម្បទារបស់គាត់មុនពេលការប្រកួត World Cup លើកដំបូង” ។ “គាត់មានបទពិសោធន៍ក្នុងការប្រកួតប្រភេទនេះ ការស្រលាញ់ក្រុមរបស់យើង គាត់អាចបង្កើតបរិយាកាសកាន់តែប្រសើរឡើងនៅក្នុងក្រុមនេះ”។ មិនយូរប៉ុន្មានមុនពេលក្រុមរបស់លោក Ancelotti ត្រូវបានប្រកាស Neymar បានផ្លាស់ប្តូរជីវប្រវត្តិ Instagram របស់គាត់តាមរបៀបប្រាប់។ គាត់មានតែ Santos ជាឯកសារយោងសម្រាប់កន្លែងបច្ចុប្បន្នរបស់គាត់ ហើយបានបន្ថែមប្រេស៊ីល។ ក្រុម​ជម្រើស​ជាតិ​ប្រេស៊ីល​ទាំង 26 នាក់​ក៏​រួម​បញ្ចូល​កីឡាករ​សំខាន់​បំផុត​ក្នុង​ប៉ុន្មាន​ឆ្នាំ​ចុង​ក្រោយ​នេះ​ដែរ​គឺ Vinicius Júnior និង Raphinha។ លោក Ancelotti ដែលបានចូលកាន់តំណែងកាលពីខែឧសភា ឆ្នាំ 2025 ប៉ុន្តែបានកោះហៅ Neymar តែប៉ុណ្ណោះកាលពីថ្ងៃចន្ទ។ កាលពីសប្តាហ៍មុនគាត់បានបន្តកិច្ចសន្យារបស់គាត់ជាមួយសហព័ន្ធបាល់ទាត់ប្រេស៊ីលរហូតដល់ការប្រកួតបាល់ទាត់ពិភពលោកឆ្នាំ 2030 ប៉ុន្តែមានពេលវេលាដ៏លំបាកមួយនៅក្នុងប្រទេសប្រេស៊ីលរហូតមកដល់ពេលនេះដោយមានកីឡាកររងរបួសជាច្រើនបានចាកចេញពីក្រុមបាល់ទាត់ពិភពលោករបស់គាត់; គាត់នឹងនឹកខ្សែប្រយុទ្ធ Rodrygo និង Estevao ច្រើនជាងគេនៅអាមេរិកខាងជើង។ ប្រេស៊ីលបើកយុទ្ធនាការ World Cup របស់ខ្លួនទល់នឹងម៉ារ៉ុកក្នុងរដ្ឋ New Jersey នៅថ្ងៃទី 13 ខែមិថុនា តាមពីក្រោយដោយ ហៃទី និងស្កុតឡែន ក្នុងពូល C ។ ___ ប្រេស៊ីល អ្នកចាំទី៖ Alisson (Liverpool), Ederson (Fenerbahce), Weverton (Gremio) ខ្សែការពារ៖ Alex Sandro, Danilo, Leo Pereira (Flamengo), Bremer (Juventus), Ibanez (Al-Ahli), Wesley (Roma), Marquinhos (Paris Saint-Germain), Gabriel Magalhaes (Arsenal), Douglas Santos (Zenit St. Petersburg) ខ្សែបម្រើ៖ Bruno Guimaraes (Newcastle), Casemiro (Manchester United), Danilo Santos (Botafogo), Fabinho (Al-Ittihad), Lucas Paqueta (Flamengo) ខ្សែប្រយុទ្ធ៖ Endrick...

Aceptan la declaración de culpabilidad de Fred Machado por lavado de dinero y fraude
content: Federico Andrés “Fred” Machado se declaró culpable en la justicia federal de Estados Unidos por el delito de conspiración para lavar dinero y para cometer fraude por vía electrónica. Lo hizo a través de un escrito entregado el pasado 13 de mayo. De esta manera, en caso de que la sentencia considere esta novedad, se dejará de lado la acusación de narcotráfico, que es más grave. La declaración de culpabilidad de Machado implica un giro en su estrategia, ya que antes se había declarado “no culpable” de todos los cargos y buscaba un juicio oral por jurado. Ahora, el juez Amos L. Mazzant deberá dictar sentencia. Machado fue extraditado desde Argentina y está detenido en un penal de Oklahoma desde hace 6 meses. Este lunes, fue interrogado para verificar que comprendía las consecuencias de la decisión que había adoptado.

title: Neymar ainda joga pelo Santos? Situação do craque gera dúvida
content: Com desgaste físico e risco de lesão, atacante pode ser preservado pelo Santos na reta final antes da Copa de 2026 No dia 27 de maio, os jogadores da Seleção Brasileira começam a se apresentar na Granja Comary para iniciar a preparação visando a Copa do Mundo de 2026. Até essa data, Neymar teria três compromissos com a camisa do Santos. O Peixe volta a campo nesta quarta-feira (20), contra o San Lorenzo, na Vila Belmiro, pela Copa Sul-Americana. Neymar não deverá atuar, já que deixou o último jogo da Série A contra o Coritiba com suspeita de lesão. Ainda há duas possíveis datas para a presença do camisa 10 em campo: no dia 23, às 19h, contra o Grêmio, em Porto Alegre, pelo Brasileirão, e no dia 26, às 21h30, na Vila Belmiro, contra o Deportivo Cuenca, pela Sul-Americana. A presença do craque nessas partidas ainda é incerta, já que há o risco de desgaste física e uma eventual contusão. Neymar se prepara para disputar sua quarta Copa do Mundo e busca, enfim, conquistar o título inédito pela Seleção Brasileira. O post Neymar ainda joga pelo Santos? Situação do craque gera dúvida apareceu primeiro em Diário do Pará .

Juntos? Ex de Léo Pereira reage à convocação para a Copa
content: Karoline Lima reage à convocação de Léo Pereira para a Copa e web relembra Militão. Foto: Reprodução A convocação da Seleção Brasileira para a Copa do Mundo movimentou as redes sociais nesta segunda-feira (18), mas não apenas pelos nomes chamados. Um dos momentos que repercutiu entre os internautas foi a reação da influenciadora digital Karoline Lima ao ouvir o nome do zagueiro Léo Pereira entre os convocados. Karoline apareceu comemorando a convocação do jogador, com quem viveu um relacionamento cercado de rumores e especulações nas redes sociais. Apesar de os dois não estarem mais juntos, muitos internautas voltaram a comentar a influência que ela teria tido na trajetória do atleta, especialmente após boatos de que Léo Pereira poderia acabar “prejudicado” por conta da exposição do relacionamento. A repercussão também envolveu o nome de Éder Militão, ex-companheiro de Karoline, com quem tem uma filha, Cecília, que ficou fora da convocação por causa de uma lesão; Militão passou por cirurgia após sofrer uma ruptura no tendão proximal do músculo bíceps femoral da perna esquerda. O tempo estimado de recuperação inviabilizou sua participação no Mundial. Léo Pereira e Karoline Lima. Foto: Reprodução / Redes sociais Léo Pereira Léo Pereira e Karoline Lima. Tainá já é mãe de Helena e Matteo, de seu relacionamento anterior com Léo Pereira; Éder é pai de Cecília, fruto do relacionamento com Karoline Lima. चीन ने स्पेससेल कॉन्स्टेलेशन के लिए सैटेलाइट का नया बैच लॉन्च किया
content: बीजिंग। चीन ने 17 मई की रात 10 बजकर 42 मिनट पर दक्षिण चीन के हाईनान प्रांत स्थित वाणिज्य अंतरिक्ष प्रक्षेपण केंद्र में लांगमार्च-8 वाहक रॉकेट से "हजार पाल नक्षत्र" परियोजना के 9वें जत्थे के उपग्रह सफलतापूर्वक लॉन्च किए। उपग्रह सुचारू रूप से निर्धारित कक्षा में दाखिल हुए और स्थिति सामान्य रही। प्रक्षेपण कार्य पूरी तरह सफल रहा। "हजार पाल नक्षत्र" परियोजना चीन द्वारा विकसित स्वतंत्र निम्न कक्षा उपग्रेह इंटरनेट परियोजना है, जिस का मुख्य उद्देश्य ब्रॉड बैंड्स और इंटरनेट कनेक्टिविटी सेवा प्रदान करना है। उसका एक अन्य नाम G60 स्टारलिंक है।

Jammu’s Road Crisis
content: Jammu, the winter capital of Jammu & Kashmir, wears many proud titles – a city of temples, a gateway to the Himalayas, and a designated Smart City. Yet, step onto its roads, and the ground reality brutally dismantles every such claim. Jammu’s roads have degenerated into an unending maze of craters, broken asphalt, and dangerous potholes that test the patience – and safety – of every commuter, every single day. The deterioration has been years in the making, but has now reached crisis proportions. Last year’s monsoon delivered a devastating blow to whatever remained of the city’s road network. Blacktopping was washed away, embankments collapsed, and pits deepened into veritable trenches. What is unconscionable is the complete and wilful institutional indifference that followed. Months have elapsed. The potholes remain. The suffering continues. Compounding this civic misery is the simultaneous reconstruction of national highways on the outskirts and through the city’s arteries. While infrastructure upgrades are necessary and welcome in the long run, the present reality is a perfect storm – construction debris, broken diversions, and pervasive dust pollution that hangs over Jammu like a shroud. Commuters are caught between the devil of crumbling city roads and the deep sea of highway construction chaos, with no respite in sight. What makes this neglect politically indefensible is a telling calendar fact: the Civil Secretariat remained in Jammu until the end of April. Senior bureaucrats and ministers traversed these very roads for six months. The lip service of “tendering is underway” rings hollow for the daily wage worker, the school bus driver, the ambulance crew, and the two-wheeler rider navigating treacherous roads after dark – when potholes turn invisible, and accidents spike alarmingly. Traffic snarls caused by these broken roads cost Jammu’s economy precious hours daily. The human cost is starker still – accidents, vehicle damage, and the silent suffering of senior citizens and differently abled commuters who find even basic mobility a harrowing ordeal. There is, however, reason for measured hope. A fresh budget has been passed. The monsoon season is approaching once again; the window to act is narrow. Authorities must move beyond tender paperwork and actually deploy machinery on the ground before the rains return and undo even that effort. The first and most visible mark of good governance is the condition of its roads. Jammu deserves better. Smart...

title: Ángel Martínez y Gavin Sheets son reconocidos como Jugadores de la Semana en MLB
content: NUEVA YORK.– El dominicano Angel Martinez y el inicialista Gavin Sheets fueron seleccionados este lunes como los Jugadores de la Semana en las Grandes Ligas, tras protagonizar destacadas actuaciones ofensivas con los Guardianes de Cleveland y los Padres de San Diego, respectivamente. Te puede interesar: Martínez, de 24 años, continúa consolidándose como una de las figuras emergentes de Cleveland. El jardinero quisqueyano bateó de 19-7 durante la semana, con cuatro cuadrangulares y siete carreras impulsadas, ayudando a los Guardianes a registrar marca de 5-1. Entre sus batazos más importantes destacó un jonrón de dos carreras que dio ventaja definitiva a Cleveland en la victoria del sábado sobre los Rojos de Cincinnati. El ambidiestro acumula una cadena de seis juegos consecutivos conectando de hit y presenta OPS de .822 con nueve vuelacercas en apenas su segunda experiencia en las Grandes Ligas. Martínez se convirtió además en el tercer jugador de los Guardianes en ganar el reconocimiento esta temporada, uniéndose a sus compañeros Jose Ramirez y Chase DeLauter. En la Liga Nacional, Sheets vivió una semana histórica con los Padres. El inicialista conectó cuatro jonrones y remolcó ocho carreras, bateando de 16-10 para elevar notablemente sus números ofensivos. El cañonero de San Diego se convirtió en el primer jugador en la historia de MLB en disparar tres cuadrangulares de tres carreras que dieron ventaja en la novena entrada durante una misma temporada, hazaña que logró antes incluso de llegar a mediados de mayo. Uno de los momentos más memorables ocurrió ante los Cerveceros de Milwaukee, cuando castigó con un jonrón decisivo al relevista dominicano Abner Uribe con dos outs en el noveno episodio. Luego continuó encendido frente a los Marineros de Seattle, incluyendo un partido de dos cuadrangulares el domingo. Sheets es el primer jugador de los Padres en recibir el premio desde que el dominicano Fernando Tatis Jr. lo obtuvo en abril de 2025. Julio Rodríguez se luce con la Jugada de la Semana Por otro lado, el también dominicano Julio Rodriguez fue reconocido con la Jugada de la Semana gracias a un espectacular robo de jonrón en el jardín central del T-Mobile Park. Rodríguez recorrió terreno hacia su izquierda y saltó por encima de la cerca para arrebatarle un cuadrangular a su compatriota Rodolfo Duran durante el partido del sábado entre Marineros y Padres. La espectacular acción reforzó aún más la reputación...

Enigma Rosso, premiato a Napoli l’artista Carmine Grasso
content: L’arte contemporanea come esperienza immersiva, linguaggio percettivo e attraversamento tra materia e immateriale: è la cifra distintiva della ricerca di Carmine Grasso , protagonista di una stagione particolarmente significativa del suo percorso artistico, segnata da importanti riconoscimenti nazionali e internazionali. Dopo il conferimento del primo premio per la sezione installazioni alla Biennale Internazionale dell’Arte Contemporanea “Dentro il Rosso” , assegnato dal presidente di giuria Giorgio Gregorio Grasso , l’artista ha ottenuto un nuovo e rilevante riconoscimento anche nell’ambito della rassegna L’Evoluzione dell’Arte Contemporanea III Millennio di Napoli , dove gli viene attribuito il primo premio nella categoria installazioni per l’opera Enigma Rosso . L’opera, realizzata attraverso acrilico su tela, ologrammi, barre luminose e musica ambientale, rappresenta uno dei punti più maturi della ricerca sviluppata da Grasso negli ultimi anni. In Enigma Rosso , il colore smette di essere semplice elemento estetico e si trasforma in spazio esperienziale, in vibrazione percettiva capace di coinvolgere lo spettatore in una relazione attiva e mutevole. La luce diventa linguaggio, il suono amplia la percezione, mentre la componente tecnologica si fonde con una riflessione profondamente umana sul tempo, sull’identità e sulla presenza. Nella nota critica firmata da Giorgio Gregorio Grasso, l’opera viene descritta come un “congegno percettivo” in cui precisione tecnica e visione umanistica convivono in equilibrio. Il rosso non appare come simbolo passionale, ma come energia originaria, frequenza vitale, elemento cosmico. In questo scenario la figura umana entra in dialogo con strutture geometriche e dimensioni immateriali, dando forma a una tensione continua tra fragilità biologica e infinito. È proprio nel dualismo tra visibile e invisibile, reale e immateriale, che la poetica di Carmine Grasso trova oggi la sua espressione più riconoscibile. Le sue installazioni abitano uno spazio liminale dove immagine, luce e memoria costruiscono ambienti in continua trasformazione. Lo spettatore non è semplice osservatore, ma parte integrante dell’opera, chiamato a completarne il significato attraverso la propria esperienza percettiva. “Vediamo una donna che scappa in un tubo luminoso, caratterizzato da elementi che ricordano il mondo reale ma invitano a un viaggio interiore- scrive il Maestro Mino Iorio – Il cuore diventa così elemento di riflessione” A...

Novo semáforo começa a ser implantado em cruzamento movimentado de Sinop
content: As obras para implantação de um novo semáforo no cruzamento da rua João Pedro Moreira de Carvalho com a Avenida Alexandre Ferronato, próximo ao viaduto central, foram iniciadas. Segundo a Guarda Civil Municipal, a intervenção faz parte das ações de melhoria da mobilidade urbana e busca proporcionar mais segurança e organização ao trânsito da região. Durante o período de execução dos trabalhos, motoristas e motociclistas devem redobrar a atenção ao trafegar pelo local. A sinalização provisória já começou a ser instalada e haverá mudanças no fluxo de veículos, além da utilização de rotas alternativas para garantir o andamento das obras e a segurança de condutores e pedestres. A expectativa é de que o novo sistema semafórico contribua para reduzir riscos de acidentes e melhorar a fluidez no cruzamento, considerado um dos pontos de grande movimentação da cidade. SC flags low conviction in UAPA cases, says 90% trials culminate in acquittals
content: Narco-terror accused from Kashmir granted bail NEW DELHI, May 18: The Supreme Court today flagged low conviction rates under the Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Act and said that more than 90 per cent of such trials culminate in acquittals. Follow the Daily Excelsior channel on WhatsApp A bench of Justices B V Nagarathna and Ujjal Bhuyan made the observations while granting bail to a Jammu and Kashmir resident, Syed Iftikhar Andrabi, accused in a narco-terrorism case. The top court referred to data compiled by the National Crime Records Bureau (NCRB) and said that the country-wide percentage of convictions under the Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Act (UAPA) for the five years from 2019-23 hovers between 2 per cent and 6 per cent. “In other words, there is a 94 per cent to 98 per cent possibility of acquittal in such cases in the country. When it comes to the Union territory of Jammu and Kashmir, the percentage of conviction is abysmal, to say the least. “For the aforesaid period, the annual rate of conviction is always less than 1 per cent. It means that at the end of the trial, there is a 99 per cent possibility of acquittal in such cases. With such statistics staring at our face, the question is, should we continue the detention of the appellant or defer the consideration to a later stage, simply because the charges are serious?” the bench said. The top court also said that, on due consideration, it is believed that Andrabi has made out a case for the grant of bail during the pendency of the trial, as there is no recovery of cash or contraband from the person of the appellant or from the premises used by the appellant, either as his residence or place of work. “All statements implicating the appellant have been made before the police, including the confessions allegedly made by the appellant himself, which, prima facie, are self-incriminating and hit by Section 25 of the Evidence Act, 1872. “The appellant has no prior antecedents of being connected with the narcotic trade or in terrorist activities. At least, no such material has been placed on record. “On the contrary, it is stated that the appellant is an ardent advocate of the constitutional, federal and democratic set-up of India. He is a supporter of the Jammu and Kashmir People’s Conference, a registered mainstream political party,” the bench noted. Andrabi had challenged an order passed by the High Court of Jammu and Kashmir and Ladakh, which dismissed his bail plea, saying the scrutiny of...

title: США таки продовжили дію ліцензії на продаж російської нафти – Reuters
content: Міністерство фінансів США ухвалило рішення продовжити на 30 діб дію ліцензії на тимчасові операції з продажу російської нафти. Як передає Укрінформ, про це повідомляє Reuters із посиланням на поінформованого співрозмовника. За словами джерела, обізнаного з планом, Міністерство фінансів США вирішило продовжити термін дії ліцензії щодо російської морської нафти, який закінчився в суботу, 16 травня, після того, як кілька країн попросили Вашингтон надати їм більше часу для купівлі російської нафти. Співрозмовник додав, що цей «санкційний виняток» діятиме ще 30 днів. Зазначається, що у березні Сполучені Штати започаткували цей виняток на російську нафту, намагаючись пом'якшити дефіцит постачання «чорного золота» та високі ціни, спричинені закриттям Іраном Ормузької протоки на тлі американо-ізраїльської війни. Проте таке рішення Вашингтона мало що зробило для стабілізації цін на бензин у самих Сполучених Штатах. Як повідомляв Укрінформ, на минулих вихідних агентство Bloomberg написало, що адміністрація президента США Дональда Трампа не продовжила дію ліцензії на тимчасові операції з продажу російської нафти. Фото: Unsplash www.ukrinform.ua

Novorizontino convoca torcida para decisões em casa na Série B e Sul-Sudeste
content: Novo Horizonte, SP, 18 (AFI) – A semana será de grandes jogos e desafios para o Grêmio Novorizontino nas disputas da Copa Sul-Sudeste e também pela Série B do Campeonato Brasileiro . Dois jogos decisivos para o futuro do Tigre do Vale nas competições, contra Chapecoense e Ceará, respectivamente, e por isso o apoio do torcedor da cidade e região no Estádio Jorge Ismael de Biasi, em Novo Horizonte, será fundamental. NOVIDADE! Futebol Interior agora está nos Canais do WhatsApp. Participe agora! Começando pela quarta-feira (20), às 19 horas, quando o Aurinegro recebe a Chapecoense no duelo de ida das semifinais da Sul-Sudeste. Em casa, o Aurinegro precisa abrir vantagem para ir à grande decisão. No sábado, às 16 horas, a parada será diante do Ceará, pela 10a rodada da Série B, onde a vitória mantém o time na briga pelas primeiras colocações. Novorizontino inicia venda de ingressos para decisões em casa na Série B e Sul-Sudeste (Foto: Divulgação) NOVORIZONTINO CONVOCA TORCIDA Os ingressos para os dois jogos do Novorizontino estão à venda pelo site da Total Ticket de forma online e presencialmente na Loja Sport Billy, no centro da cidade. No jogo contra a Chape, os bilhetes no setor de Arquibancada Geral Local custam apenas R$ 10 (inteira) e R$ 5 (meia-entrada). A torcida do Tigre ainda terá disponível os bilhetes para o setor de Arquibancada Inferior, com acesso pelo Portão 1, ao preço de R$ 20 (inteira) e R$ 10 (meia). A Geral Visitante custa R$ 20 (inteira) e R$ 10 (meia). As bilheterias abrem na quarta às 18 horas. VALORES DA SÉRIE B No sábado, pela Série B do Brasileiro, os ingressos na Arquibancada Geral do Tigre R$ 20 (inteira) e R$ 10 (meia-entrada). Na Inferior, com acesso pelo Portão 1, o preço será de R$ 40 (inteira) e R$ 20 (meia). A Geral Visitante custa R$ 40 (inteira) e R$ 20 (meia). Bilheterias abertas a partir das 15 horas.

இலங்கை அரசமைப்பின் கீழ் தமிழர்களுக்கு நீதி கிடைக்காது: தமிழகத்தின் முக்கிய அரசியல் புள்ளி பகிரங்கம்
content: முள்ளிவாய்க்கால் தமிழினப் படுகொலையின் 17 ஆம் ஆண்டு நினைவு நாளை முன்னிட்டு பாட்டாளி மக்கள் கட்சி நிறுவனர் மருத்துவர் ச. இராமதாசு அறிக்கையொன்றை விடுத்துள்ளார். குறித்த அறிக்கையில், இது சாதாரண உள்நாட்டுப் போர் அல்ல, திட்டமிடப்பட்ட ஓர் இனப்படுகொலை என அவர் சுட்டிக்காட்டியுள்ளார். 1948ஆம் ஆண்டு முதல் இன்று வரை எந்தவொரு சிங்கள அரசும் தமிழர்களின் உரிமைகளை வழங்க முன்வரவில்லை என்பதால் இலங்கை அரசமைப்பின் கீழ் தமிழர்களுக்கு நீதி கிடைக்கும் என்று நம்புவது வீண் என அவர் சுட்டிக்காட்டியுள்ளார். பொது வாக்கெடுப்பு இந்தக் கொடூரத்திற்கு நீதி கிடைக்க வேண்டுமானால் ஐக்கிய நாடுகள் சபையின் கண்காணிப்பில் பன்னாட்டு நீதி விசாரணை நடத்தப்பட்டு போர்க்குற்றவாளிகளுக்கு உரிய தண்டனை வழங்கப்பட வேண்டும் என வலியுறுத்தியுள்ளார். ஈழத் தமிழர்களிடம் ஐநா சபையின் மேற்பார்வையில் ஒரு சுதந்திரமான பொது வாக்கெடுப்பு நடத்தப்பட வேண்டும் என்றும் அதன் மூலம் கிடைக்கும் முடிவை சர்வதேச சமூகம் நடைமுறைப்படுத்துவதே உண்மையான நீதியாகும் எனக் கோரியுள்ளார். தனித் தமிழீழமே ஈழத் தமிழர்களின் வாழ்வுக்கும் பாதுகாப்புக்கும் உரிய ஒரே தீர்வு என்ற அவர்களின் விருப்பத்தை உலகம் அங்கீகரிக்க இதுவே சரியான வழி என்றும் தமிழர்கள் இழந்த நிலத்தையும் உரிமையையும் மீட்கும் வரை பாமக தோளோடு தோள் நின்று போராடும் என்றும் அவர் உறுதியளித்துள்ளமை குறிப்பிடத்தக்கது. செய்திகளை உடனுக்குடன் தெரிந்து கொள்ள IBC தமிழ் WHATSAPP இல் இணைந்து கொள்ளுங்கள்...!

Built for vapers who care about flavor, airflow precision, and long-lasting performance, this tank feels like a serious upgrade rather than a minor refresh. The biggest strength of the UFORCE-X TANK II is how balanced the overall vaping experience feels. Its upgraded Golden Triangle Airflow Structure creates a smoother draw while improving vapor consistency. Whether someone prefers a dense DTL inhale or a more restricted RDL setup, the airflow remains clean and controlled without becoming turbulent or overly noisy. The rotary airflow adjustment dial also makes fine-tuning much easier compared to traditional airflow systems. With the UFORCE-X TANK II, the larger transparent tank keeps refill interruptions to a minimum while still allowing users to monitor e-liquid levels easily. The top-fill design adds convenience and helps keep the overall experience mess-free. Compatibility is another area where this tank performs exceptionally well. The full support for all PnP X series coils also gives users flexibility to switch between MTL, RDL, and DTL vaping styles without needing a completely different setup. Design-wise, the tank keeps a modern industrial look with clean metallic finishes available in Silver, Gun Metal, and Black.
