Independiente del Valle quiere sellar su clasificación en la Copa Libertadores: ¿dónde y cómo ver el partido ante Libertad?
content: Independiente del Valle buscará dar un paso gigante hacia los octavos de final de la Copa Libertadores cuando reciba a Club Libertad este martes en el estadio Banco Guayaquil . Los ‘ rayados ’ atraviesan uno de sus mejores momentos de la temporada y quieren aprovecharlo para acercarse definitivamente a la siguiente ronda. View this post on Instagram ¿Dónde ver Independiente del Valle vs Libertad? El partido se podrá ver en Ecuador a través de: Disney+ Premium Fecha y hora del partido Martes 19 de mayo de 2026 21:00 (hora de Ecuador) Estadio Banco Guayaquil Así llega Independiente del Valle Independiente del Valle es segundo del grupo con 7 puntos gracias a: 2 victorias 1 empate 1 derrota En caso de conseguir una victoria frente a Libertad, el equipo ecuatoriano llegaría a 10 puntos y prácticamente dejaría encaminada su clasificación a los octavos de final. Además, complicaría muchísimo el panorama de Universidad Central de Venezuela , que todavía deberá cerrar la fase de grupos frente a Rosario Central en Argentina y posteriormente visitar Paraguay para enfrentar a Libertad. IDV llega en un momento espectacular Los dirigidos por Joaquín Papa atraviesan una racha impresionante: 7 victorias en sus últimos 8 partidos. Además, llegan tras golear 3-0 en sus dos encuentros más recientes, mostrando un enorme poder ofensivo y mucha solidez defensiva. En la LigaPro también dominan cómodamente el campeonato, consolidándose como el equipo más dominante del fútbol ecuatoriano. Carlos González, el hombre gol Uno de los grandes responsables del momento de IDV es el delantero paraguayo Carlos González. El atacante suma ya 5 goles en esta edición de la Copa Libertadores y actualmente es el máximo goleador del torneo. Su experiencia, juego aéreo y contundencia se han convertido en una de las principales armas ofensivas de los ‘rayados’.

title: Cai o número de cidades no ES vulneráveis nas contas públicas; veja ranking
content: Foto: Magnific O Tribunal de Contas do Espírito Santo ( TCE-ES ) divulgou nesta segunda-feira (18) o Índice de Vulnerabilidade Fiscal (IVF), que aponta que o Estado tem menos municípios vulneráveis para as mudanças nas contas públicas. O índice avalia a capacidade dos municípios de suportar quedas de receita e aumentos de despesa inesperados . O estudo avaliou todos os 78 municípios capixabas em 2025. De acordo com o levantamento do TCE-ES, o Espírito Santo passou de 25 para 32 municípios com baixa vulnerabilidade de 2024 para 2025. O estudo também mostra que apenas um município tem alta vulnerabilidade; em 2024, eram dois. Na média vulnerabilidade, o número passou de 51 para 45 cidades. A única cidade considerada altamente vulnerável é Mimoso do Sul . Já a cidade melhor ranqueada é Aracruz , que se mantém regularmente com baixa vulnerabilidade desde 2019. O IVF considera quatro critérios: margem recorrente; endividamento; situação previdenciária (ISP); e liquidez. As notas variam de 0 a 25 em cada critério e são somadas, sendo que quanto menor a nota, menor a vulnerabilidade. Ou seja, as melhores notas são as menores. Os municípios com nota até 50 são considerados baixa vulnerabilidade; entre 51 e 80, média; e mais de 80, alta. O auditor de controle externo, Robert Detoni , autor do estudo, avaliou que os municípios tiveram melhora, mesmo com instabilidade no comércio internacional, por conta de medidas como tarifaço. Apesar do tarifaço no mercado externo desfavorável ao Estado em 2025, e suas consequências econômicas e fiscais, nós tivemos uma melhora do índice, uma redução da vulnerabilidade de forma geral. O número de municípios com alta vulnerabilidade já chegou a 8 em 2019 e atualmente está em somente 1. Isso é muito positivo. Robert Detoni No entanto, segundo o auditor, os melhores índices ainda são os de 2020 e 2021, por conta dos auxílios que os municípios receberam durante a pandemia da Covid-19. “Isso reduziu de forma ‘artificial’ a vulnerabilidade fiscal”, explica. Cidades com maior prioridade de ajuda O estudo também classifica os municípios que mais precisam de ações de controle externo para reduzir os riscos fiscais. Sete municípios têm alta prioridade: Barra de São Francisco, Divino de São Lourenço, Guaçuí, Irupi, Itapemirim, Iúna e Pancas; Seis têm média prioridade: Atílio Vivácqua, Ibitirama, Jerônimo Monteiro, Marataízes, Mimoso do Sul e Presidente Kennedy; Nove...

Ataque armado en mezquita de California terminó con cinco muertos
content: El tiroteo registrado este lunes en el Centro Islámico de San Diego, en California , dejó cinco personas fallecidas, entre ellas los dos presuntos atacantes, informaron autoridades locales y agentes del FBI. Según el reporte oficial, las otras tres víctimas eran adultos vinculados al lugar, entre ellos un guardia de seguridad que intentó contener la situación durante el ataque. Los atacantes eran adolescentes Las autoridades señalaron que los sospechosos tenían entre 17 y 19 años y habrían muerto por heridas de bala autoinfligidas luego del tiroteo. Los cuerpos de ambos adolescentes fueron encontrados dentro de un vehículo estacionado cerca de la mezquita. El jefe de la Policía de San Diego, Scott Wahl , indicó que las investigaciones continuarán durante los próximos días debido a la complejidad del caso. 🚨 #AlertaADN ⚠️🔴En total, cinco personas murieron en el tiroteo en el Centro Islámico de San Diego; se trata de tres adultos y dos sospechosos, ambos adolescentes, quienes tras cometer el crimen se quitaron la vida, informan en conferencia personal del FBI ( @FBI ) y la policía... pic.twitter.com/xUsRnhOplh — adn Noticias (@adnnoticiasmx) May 18, 2026 Investigan posible crimen de odio El FBI y la Policía informaron que el ataque está siendo investigado bajo la hipótesis de un posible crimen de odio contra la comunidad musulmana. Psiquiatra expone la mente de Andreína Lamota tras el asesinato y desmembramiento de su madre El hecho ocurrió en el Centro Islámico de San Diego, considerado la mezquita más grande del condado y uno de los principales puntos de reunión de la comunidad islámica local. Videos difundidos por medios estadounidenses mostraron a varias personas, incluidos menores de edad, evacuando el recinto mientras eran escoltados por agentes de seguridad. El ataque ocurre en medio de un aumento de incidentes violentos y amenazas contra comunidades religiosas y lugares de culto en Estados Unidos.

title: Empresa eléctrica de EE. UU. realiza simulacro de huracanes con IA
content: La Florida Power & Light Company (FPL), considerada la empresa de servicio eléctrico más grande de Estados Unidos, puso en marcha sus protocolos de preparación para la próxima temporada de huracanes del Atlántico. Los ejercicios preventivos consistieron en la realización de un simulacro a gran escala que integró el uso de herramientas de inteligencia artificial (IA) para optimizar los tiempos de respuesta operativa. La organización emitió una alerta debido a que las tormentas actuales tienden a formarse e intensificarse a gran velocidad. El entrenamiento de contingencia se basó en el escenario ficticio de un ciclón de categoría 2 denominado “Aiden”, el cual impactaría la mayor parte de la costa este del estado de Florida. La movilización de recursos técnicos tuvo como objetivo evaluar el desempeño de sistemas avanzados de IA enfocados en el procesamiento automatizado y análisis de imágenes fijas y en movimiento. Con este despliegue, la firma busca proteger y restablecer el flujo eléctrico a los más de 12 millones de usuarios a los que abastece en la región. “En los últimos años, hemos visto tormentas que se forman y se intensifican muy rápido, dejando menos tiempo para que las familias y los negocios tomen decisiones importantes. El simulacro de tormenta de FPL nos ayuda a prepararnos”, declaró formalmente Armando Pimentel, director ejecutivo de la organización empresarial. La implementación tecnológica procesa millones de datos por segundo, agilizando el envío de reportes hacia el centro de mando unificado. Lee más: Inauguran el Costco más grande de Latinoamérica con inversión histórica Lee más: Bomberos de CSL alertan desconocimiento en protocolos de huracanes en Los Cabos Monitoreo con drones y pronósticos meteorológicos en el Atlántico El sistema de gestión de emergencias de la compañía eléctrica incluye el monitoreo continuo de una flotilla de aeronaves no tripuladas. Estos vehículos aéreos ejecutan cientos de vuelos de supervisión diariamente con el fin de localizar fallas estructurales y responder de manera eficiente a las solicitudes de los usuarios tras el paso de un fenómeno meteorológico de gran magnitud. De acuerdo con la vocera institucional, Florencia Olivera, las acciones preventivas no deben minimizarse aun cuando en el ciclo anterior no se registraron impactos directos en tierra estadounidense. content: لعرض هذا المحتوى من YouTube، يجب عليك تمكين تتبع الإعلانات وقياس الجمهور يقبل إدارة تفضيلاتي يبدو أن أحد ملحقات المتصفح الخاص بك يمنع مشغل الفيديو من التحميل لعرض هذا المحتوى، قد تحتاج إلى تعطيله على هذا الموقع حاول ثانية © فرانس 24 صادر: 18/05/2026 – 23:16 12:52 دقيقة من العرض وقت القراءة 1 دقيقة وفي كينيا، قُتل أربعة أشخاص على الأقل واعتقل المئات في احتجاجات مميتة على أسعار الوقود، حيث يلقي المتظاهرون باللوم في إغلاق إيران لمضيق هرمز على تدبير سقوط الحكومة. في شرق جمهورية الكونغو الديمقراطية، أدى شكل نادر من فيروس الإيبولا إلى مقتل أكثر من 100 شخص، مع ما يقرب من 400 حالة مشتبه بها، مما أثار قلق الدول المجاورة وحالة طوارئ صحية دولية أعلنتها منظمة الصحة العالمية. وفي الوقت نفسه، في سيراليون، يدخل عدد أكبر من النساء تجارة عربات الركشة التي يهيمن عليها الذكور تقليديا، ويغتنمون الفرص الاقتصادية الجديدة ويغيرون الأدوار بين الجنسين. من إنتاج جورجا كالفين سميث وغيوم جوجيون رابط المصدر

EE.UU. anuncia sanciones contra ministros y servicio de inteligencia cubanos: “han participado en represión del pueblo”
content: Estados Unidos anunció este lunes sanciones contra ministros, miembros de la cúpula militar y los servicios de inteligencia cubanos, como parte de su política de presión sobre la isla comunista. “ He designado a 11 jerarcas del régimen cubano y a tres organizaciones gubernamentales, incluidos funcionarios del gobierno y figuras militares vinculadas al aparato de seguridad de Cuba , muchos de los cuales son responsables de, o han participado en, la represión del pueblo cubano”, explicó el secretario de Estado, Marco Rubio. Entre los sancionados están los ministros de Energía, de Justicia, de Comunicaciones y el presidente de la Asamblea Nacional. También entran en la lista el viceministro de las Fuerzas Armadas, los jefes del Ejército Oriental y Central, el jefe de la contrainteligencia militar así como la Dirección General de Inteligencia. Las sanciones impiden a esos funcionarios y entidades entablar ningún tipo de relación económica con una contraparte estadounidense. “Las designaciones de hoy restringen aún más la capacidad del régimen cubano para suprimir la voluntad del pueblo cubano. Se pueden esperar nuevas medidas de sanciones en los próximos días y semanas”, añadió Rubio en su comunicado. Sometida a un embargo desde 1962, Cuba enfrenta desde enero un bloqueo petrolero impuesto por el gobierno de Donald Trump , que ha desencadenado en una severa crisis energético con masivos y prolongados cortes de electricidad. A principios de mayo, Trump ya había aprobado un nuevo paquete de sanciones contra La Habana. Washington asegura que la isla representa una amenaza a su seguridad nacional. En este contexto de tensiones bilaterales, el director de la CIA, John Ratcliffe, viajó el jueves a La Habana para una reunión excepcional con altos funcionarios cubanos. Ambos países mantienen conversaciones, y Washington ha ofrecido 100 millones de dólares en ayuda de urgencia para la isla en medio de una gravísima crisis económica , pero solo si permite que esa ayuda sea distribuida por la Iglesia católica. Desde que inició el bloqueo petrolero, Washington sólo ha permitido la llegada de un tanquero ruso con unas 100.000 toneladas de crudo a finales de marzo. El presidente cubano Miguel Díaz-Canel revindicó este lunes el derecho “legítimo” de su país a responder a una posible agresión de Estados Unidos. El medio estadounidense Axios afirmó el domingo, citando inteligencia clasificada, que Cuba ha adquirido más de 300 drones...

Sequía amenaza a más de 6.400 ganaderos del Caribe; leche y queso podrían subir hasta un 80 %
content: Las altas temperaturas que ya golpean varias zonas del Caribe colombiano encienden alarmas en el sector ganadero. Pastizales deteriorados, reservorios de agua que menguan y animales que empiezan a perder peso son las primeras señales de una emergencia climática que, de agravarse, podría trasladar sus consecuencias directamente al mercado de alimentos. La Asociación de Ganaderos de la Costa Norte, Asoganorte, advirtió que cerca de 6.400 productores de Córdoba, Sucre, Bolívar, Atlántico y Magdalena podrían verse afectados por la temporada seca. El ochenta por ciento de ellos son pequeños productores con menos de 50 reses, lo que reduce considerablemente su capacidad para sortear una crisis climática prolongada. “El calor extremo nos está golpeando desde ahora y muchos campesinos no tuvieron tiempo suficiente para prepararse. Hay preocupación porque los animales empiezan a resentir la falta de agua y alimento”, advirtió Jorge Rodríguez, director ejecutivo de Asoganorte. La preocupación no se limita al campo. Según las proyecciones del gremio, productos como la leche y el queso podrían encarecerse entre un 50 % y un 80 % si las condiciones climáticas se mantienen en ascenso durante los próximos meses. Los altos costos de suplementos alimenticios, concentrados y sales mineralizadas ya presionan especialmente a los pequeños y medianos productores. En departamentos como Atlántico y Magdalena, la situación es más crítica en municipios del sur, donde los reservorios han disminuido de forma notoria por la ausencia de lluvias. La alerta del sector coincide con el anuncio del Ideam, el Ministerio de Ambiente y la UNGRD, que estimaron en un 82 % la probabilidad de consolidación del fenómeno de El Niño en el trimestre de mayo a julio.

title: Neymar vai ser artilheiro do Brasil nas Copas? Veja os números
content: Neymar é o maior artilheiro da história da seleção brasileira Reprodução X/@neymarjr Para a alegria de muitos torcedores, Neymar estará presente na Copa do Mundo de 2026 . No elenco de 26 atletas convocados pelo técnico Carlo Ancelotti , o atacante é o jogador de maior qualidade técnica e repercussão. Mesmo não vivendo o melhor momento de campo, é esperado que o Camisa 10 santista seja um fator desequilibrante positivamente no torneio da FIFA . Aos 34 anos, Neymar irá para a sua quarta edição do Mundial (2014, 2018 e 2022). Ele chegará na competição com números relevantes quando o assunto é seleção brasileira. Artilheiro do Brasil em Copas Neymar Superbet 10.00 18+. Jogue com Responsabilidade. Aplicam-se T&C. Publicidade. Neymar em 2026 A atual temporada pelo Santos é de altos e baixos, com uma certa instabilidade. Neymar foi chamado pela comissão técnica muito pelo que representa e pelo o que já fez no passado. Até o momento em que este texto foi escrito, ele esteve em campo em 13 oportunidades – Brasileirão , Copa do Brasil , Sul-Americana e Paulistão –, por 1.200 minutos, marcou seis gols e ajudou com duas assistências, Maior artilheiro do Brasil O atacante é o jogador que mais vezes balançou as redes adversárias vestindo a camisa do time canarinho. Foram 79 gols marcados e 59 assistências em 124 partidas disputadas. Ele supera Pelé e Ronaldo Fenômeno , que tiveram 77 e 62 gols feitos, respectivamente. Especificamente em Copa do Mundo, Neymar teve até o momento oito gols em 13 partidas. Em 2014, aqui no Brasil, ele fez quatro gols e deu uma assistência em cinco jogos. Quatro anos mais tarde, na Rússia, anotou dois gols e deu uma assistência em cinco partidas. Na participação mais recente, em três duelo, no Qatar, fez dois gols e deu uma assistência. O jogador que mais vezes fez gols nos mundiais, somando todas as edições que participou foi o Ronaldo Fenômeno. Foram 15 em 1998, 2002 e 2006. Atrás vem Pelé, com 12 gols. Próximo compromisso pela seleção Até a convocação final para o Mundial de 2026, nos Estados Unidos , Canadá e México , Neymar ainda não tinha sido convocado por Ancelotti, que assumiu o time em maio de 2025. A primeira partida do jogador com o treinador italiano, ao que tudo indica, será no dia 31 de maio, às 18h30, no Maracanã, no Rio de Janeiro. O jogo com o Panamá , em duelo amistoso, será a despedida do time do Brasil antes de embarcar para os Estados Unidos . Depois, em...

title: A través de ‘Rapiendosos’ Poder Judicial entrega a domicilio depósitos judiciales a personas vulnerables en el Callao
content: Cortes del país utilizan, además, diversas plataformas digitales, así como emails y SMS, para lugares alejados y zonas de frontera. En el marco de la Campaña Nacional Simultánea ‘Justicia y Derechos para Niñas, Niños y Adolescentes (NNA)’ , la Corte del Callao puso en marcha un novedoso servicio llamado “Rapiendosos”, para entrega de endosos judiciales en la puerta de la casa de alimentistas y personas en condición de vulnerabilidad. Así, cada viernes, en tanto dure la campaña (que finalizará el 29 del presente mes), un motorizado acude a las casas de personas con discapacidad, personas adultas mayores y gestantes para entregarles órdenes de pago que devienen de procesos judiciales El presidente del referido distrito judicial, Miguel Castañeda Moya , acudió a los hogares de cuatro familias en Bellavista, Carmen de la Legua y Reynoso, Cercado del Callao y La Perla, donde supervisó la entrega de las órdenes de pago a los beneficiarios. Con los “Rapiendosos” , la corte chalaca se suma a la campaña impulsada por la presidenta del Poder Judicial, Janet Tello Gilardi, la cual está orientada a fortalecer la protección integral de los derechos de los NNA. El magistrado señaló, además, que, del total de depósitos judiciales del distrito judicial a su cargo, alrededor del 50% han sido notificados por correo electrónico, modalidad que desde el 1 de mayo se ha establecido de manera permanente en todos los módulos judiciales. Más de S/ 71 millones Cabe remarcar que, desde el inicio de la campaña hasta hoy lunes 18, juezas y jueces de la Corte del Callao han emitido órdenes por un total S/ 3 millones 462 mil 461, cifra que, en todo el país, llega a los S/ 71 millones 549 mil 741, conforme al último reporte del equipo técnico del Poder Judicial. Este monto dinerario comprende conceptos referidos a pensión alimentos, reparaciones civiles, indemnizaciones laborales y omisión a la asistencia familiar, entre otros. De la suma total, S/ 29 millones 529 mil 490 corresponden a conceptos laborales, S/ 19 millones 675 mil 207 por casos en civil, S/ 15 millones 365 mil 925 por pensión de alimentos, S/4 millones 495 mil 96 por reparación civil y S/ 2 millones 486 mil 25 por omisión a la asistencia familiar. De otro lado, hasta ahora, la Corte de Lima endosó a las beneficiarias depósitos por S/ 22 millones 784 mil 555, La Libertad por un monto de S/ 6 millones 705 mil 272 y Piura por S/ 5 millones 931 mil 429. Stein proclaims North Carolina Heat Safety Week
content: This week Gov. Josh Stein proclaimed May 18-22, 2026, North Carolina Heat Safety Week to raise awareness about the dangers that high temperatures pose to people’s health. The proclamation also brings attention to state programs that support North Carolina’s cities, towns, and counties in keeping residents and visitors safe from extreme heat. North Carolina’s heat season runs from May 1 to September 30 each year. “Being resilient to extreme heat means understanding how it can affect you and your community,” Stein said. “All North Carolinians can take actions to protect themselves and their families, employers can protect their workers, and local governments can protect their residents. Our state agencies and local governments are working hard to help keep people cool and safe.” In 2025, there were more than 5,700 heat-related visits to North Carolina emergency departments. Last July marked North Carolina’s second-warmest July on record. While heat-related illnesses can affect anyone regardless of age or physical condition, outdoor workers, individuals living outside, infants and children, older adults, pregnant people, athletes, low-income individuals, and people with underlying health conditions are at a disproportionate risk of experiencing adverse health effects. “As our summer days and nights stay warmer for longer, it’s critical that all North Carolinians learn about the symptoms of heat illness and the steps to take to cool down,” said NC Department of Environmental Quality Secretary Reid Wilson. “DEQ’s State Resilience Office is working closely with local governments to help them identify strategies to help manage extreme heat.” On May 11, the State Resilience Office, NC Department of Health and Human Services, the National Weather Service and the North Carolina State Climate Office hosted the state’s first Heat Season Kick-off briefing. The briefing gave a forecast for the 2026 heat season, an overview of larger climate patterns of extreme heat in North Carolina, a tutorial on recognizing the signs and symptoms of heat illness and an introduction to the tools and resources that are available to support North Carolina’s local governments and residents. The SRO with supports local governments in North Carolina to develop heat action plans to respond to extreme heat by activating services like cooling centers during hot days. In 2024, the SRO launched the Heat Action Plan Toolkit in partnership with NCDHHS, North Carolina State Climate Office, and...

title: Neymar comemora convocação para a Copa do Mundo com publicidades
content: Campinas, SP, 18 – Neymar comemorou a convocação para a Copa do Mundo com várias publicidades nas redes sociais. Nesta segunda-feira, o técnico Carlo Ancelotti anunciou os 26 jogadores que vão representar a seleção brasileira no Mundial deste ano, que será realizado nos Estados Unidos, Canadá e México. NOVIDADE! Futebol Interior agora está nos Canais do WhatsApp. Participe agora! O jogador do Santos foi uma das grandes novidades da lista de convocados. Esta é a primeira vez que ele foi chamado para a seleção desde a chegada do italiano. “E o Neymar? A pergunta que o Brasil inteiro repetiu nos últimos 4 anos acabou de ser respondida: o comeback veio aí. E se tem alguém que entende o valor de fazer uma entrega de respeito na hora certa, somos nós. Prepara a torcida, que a gente entrega o resto”, escreveu o marketplace Mercado Livre em publicação no Instagram. O retorno Vale destacar que Neymar não atuava na seleção há cerca de dois anos. O último jogo do craque com o Brasil foi em outubro de 2023, quando sofreu uma lesão no ligamento cruzado anterior do joelho esquerdo. “A ligação que todos estávamos esperando...O cenário mundial não seria o mesmo sem o Neymar”, escreveu a Puma em publicação também no Instagram. Outra marca que divulgou uma propaganda em colaboração com o jogador foi a Red Bull. “79 gols pelo Brasil, e ainda não acabou. Te vejo em campo Neymar”, escreveu a marca de bebidas energéticas na mesma rede social. A agenda do Brasil na Copa do Mundo O Brasil está no Grupo C do Mundial, ao lado de Marrocos, Escócia e Haiti. Na primeira fase da competição, todos os jogos da seleção serão disputados nos Estados Unidos. O início da caminhada do Brasil rumo ao hexa é no dia 13 de junho, às 19h (horário de Brasília), contra Marrocos, no MetLife Stadium, em East Rutherford, Nova Jersey. Na segunda rodada, a seleção enfrenta o Haiti, no dia 19 de junho, às 21h30 (horário de Brasília), no Lincoln Financial Field, na Filadélfia, na Pensilvânia. O último jogo do Brasil na fase de grupos é contra a Escócia, no dia 24 de junho, às 19h (horário de Brasília), no Hard Rock Stadium, em Miami, Flórida. A abertura do Mundial será no dia 11 de junho, às 16h (horário de Brasília), entre México, um dos países anfitriões do torneio, contra a África do Sul, no Estádio Azteca, na Cidade do México. Já a grande final será no dia 19 de julho, às 16h (horário de Brasília), no MetLife Stadium.

انتهى عرض كولبير المتأخر. إليك ما يخبئه للحلقات النهائية
content: يختتم هذا الأسبوع عقد من التاريخ الليلي الخفيف، مع انتهاء فترة ستيفن كولبيرت كمضيف لبرنامج “The Late Show” يوم الخميس. تم التصوير في مسرح إد سوليفان، العرض الأخير هو البرنامج الحواري الرائد في وقت متأخر من الليل على شبكة سي بي إس، وتم بثه لأول مرة في عام 1993، مع ديفيد ليترمان كمضيف. انضم كولبير لأول مرة إلى العرض في عام 2015 بعد فترات ناجحة البرنامج اليومي و تقرير كولبيرت حيث ساعدت مونولوجاته السياسية خلال إدارة ترامب الأولى على زيادة شعبيته، خاصة بين المشاهدين الأكثر ليبرالية. كما ينظر الكثيرون إلى انتقاداته الصريحة لترامب على أنها عجلت بإنهاء مهام استضافته. أعلنت شركة باراماونت، الشركة الأم لقناة CBS، في يوليو الماضي، أن هذا الموسم، الذي ينتهي في 21 مايو، سيكون الموسم الأخير لها العرض الأخير . وأكدت شبكة سي بي إس أن الإلغاء كان قرارًا ماليًا، لكن الكثيرين ما زالوا متشككين، مشيرين إلى ضغوط محتملة من الإدارة الحالية – والتي انتقدها كولبير على نطاق واسع. جاء هذا الإعلان في الوقت الذي كانت فيه الشركة لا تزال تسعى إلى الاندماج الذي أدى إلى إنشاء شركة Paramount Skydance، بعد وقت قصير من التوصل إلى صفقة بقيمة 16 مليون دولار مع ترامب في مقابلة تم بثها على الهواء. 60 دقيقة خلال انتخابات 2024. “لقد تم التخلي عنه لأن الأشخاص الذين يبيعون الشبكة لـ Skydance قالوا: “أوه لا، لن تكون هناك أي مشاكل مع هذا الرجل. سوف نعتني بالعرض. دعونا فقط ندرج هذا في الاتفاقية. متى يجف الحبر الموجود على الشيك؟ قال ليترمان نيويورك تايمز حول الإلغاء. “سأقوم فقط بالتسجيل لأقول ما أقوله: إنهم يكذبون. ماذا يوجد في المتجر؟ قبل الاسبوع الماضي أعلنت شبكة سي بي إس أحدث تشكيلة وتشكيلة ضيوف في العرض، بما في ذلك النجوم الكبار والمشاهير والقطاعات الخاصة – على الرغم من ذلك، مثل مستقبل كولبير وفريقه، لا يزال الكثير غير مؤكد. سيكون عرض يوم الاثنين هو ما تطلق عليه الشبكة اسم “أسوأ ما في”. عرض متأخر مع ستيفن كولبيرت »، موضحاً أن البرنامج لن يكون مقطعاً، بل سيقدم محتوى جديداً. وسيستضيف عرض الثلاثاء زميل كولبير الكوميدي ومعلمه جون ستيوارت، بالإضافة إلى ستيفن سبيلبرغ، وعرضًا موسيقيًا مشتركًا لكولبير وديفيد بيرن. وسيشهد يوم الأربعاء، الليلة التي تسبق انتهاء العرض، عرضًا لبروس سبرينغستين، بالإضافة إلى مقطع أخير من “The Colbert Questionert”. لم يتم الإعلان عن ضيوف الحلقة الأخيرة بعد، على الرغم من أن مقدمي البرامج الحوارية جيمي كيميل وجيمي فالون أعلنا عن إعادة عرض يوم الخميس تكريما لكولبير. انضم كلا المضيفين، وكذلك الزملاء سيث مايرز وجون أوليفر، إلى كولبير الأسبوع الماضي كتوحيد لـ Strike Force Five، وهو الاسم الذي أطلقته المجموعة على نفسها عندما وحدت قواها لدعم ودفع أجور كتابها خلال إضراب WGA لعام 2023. خلال المقابلة، وافق جميع الكوميديين على...

title: Aos 43, atriz de Coração Acelerado fala sobre corpo e maternidade
content: Após 10 anos longe das novelas, Leandra Leal retorna como a vilã Zilá e reflete sobre maturidade e aceitação. Foto: Instagram/Globo. Aos 43 anos, Leandra Leal vive um momento de grandes reflexões e transformações. A artista celebra o seu retorno à televisão na pele da vilã Zilá , na novela “ Coração Acelerado “, após 10 anos longe dos folhetins. Durante uma entrevista recente concedida ao portal Splash , do UOL, a atriz abriu o coração e detalhou como a pandemia mudou a sua visão em relação à pressão estética e à maternidade. Zilá Sampaio Amaral (Leandra Leal). Foto: TV Globo Zilá Sampaio Amaral (Leandra Leal). Foto: TV Globo Zilá Sampaio Amaral (Leandra Leal). Foto: TV Globo Zilá Sampaio Amaral (Leandra Leal). Foto: TV Globo Zilá (Leandra Leal) em Coração Acelerado. Foto: Reprodução/TV Globo O corpo e a pressão estética A crise sanitária fez a atriz valorizar a saúde acima de tudo e a olhar para si mesma com muito mais gratidão. Nesse sentido, Leandra sentiu a necessidade de se afastar dos padrões irreais de beleza. Ela explicou ao UOL que mudou bastante desse lugar de cobrança diante das pressões que historicamente recaem sobre as mulheres. Hoje, a atriz afirma que amadureceu em relação à própria aparência e prefere focar no que realmente importa. Ela destacou a magia de estar viva e pontuou que é exatamente através do seu corpo que ela pode experienciar o mundo. Maternidade e críticas Mãe de Julia , de 11 anos , e de Damião , de 2 , a artista também falou sobre a intensidade da maternidade . Ela define a criação dos filhos como uma experiência revolucionária, já que as crianças mudaram completamente a sua relação com o tempo e com as escolhas profissionais. Apesar de viver um bom momento familiar, Leandra reconhece os seus privilégios e aproveitou o espaço na entrevista para criticar a falta de políticas públicas de apoio às famílias no Brasil. Como exemplo, ela citou a curta duração da licença-paternidade. A atriz lamentou o fato de que cinco dias não são suficientes nem para o cordão umbilical do bebê cair. O retorno às novelas O aguardado retorno aos estúdios da Globo aconteceu por uma combinação especial de fatores. A personagem Zilá é uma mulher movida por sentimentos difíceis e tenta controlar tudo ao seu redor. Contudo, a vilã também garante boas risadas ao público. Durante a conversa com o portal, a atriz confessou que sentia falta do ritmo intenso de...

North Texas nonprofit’s global work stalled by war with Iran
content: The war with Iran is impacting the work of a North Texas nonprofit that drills fresh, clean water wells in parts of East Africa where water is scarce. Texans on a Mission said the resources needed to continue drilling are stuck on a ship in the Strait of Hormuz. Texans on a Mission is a nonprofit known to show up after natural disasters. But the organization, formerly known as Texas Baptist Men, also works around the globe in places where there’s no clean or safe drinking water. Recently, their efforts to drill new water wells have slowed to a trickle because of what’s been happening with the war in Iran. "Texans on a Mission drills water wells around the world and we’re especially focused on northern Uganda and south Sudan. And so, the difficulty in shipping through the Strait of Hormuz has created significant challenges in shipping and getting items into those areas," said John Hall, a spokesman for the organization. Products like cement can’t get in. "That cement is what we used to finish off all the wells and make sure we create pads so that they stay hygienic and they function well. And so the lack of cement has completely shut down all of our work in south Sudan. It also has impacted our work in northern Uganda. In addition to that, we have a large truck that carries all of our supplies around our pipes and our fittings materials that are used for water wells. We needed a new truck that we ordered months ago. Our new truck is stuck in that strait," Hall said. So is a drill that’s used for smaller jobs to tap into water below the surface. Hall said it’s ironic that what his organization needs to dig wells to give fresh water is literally stuck in a body of water. "We’re stuck here, literally with a boat on the water that is preventing folks who need water. The irony isn’t lost on us and we’re just, we’re asking folks to pray that doors are opened because this is out of our hands," he said. The crisis is not just about quenching thirst. It’s about saving lives, according to Hall. "These are long term solutions for these villages. These are very rudimentary villages, no electricity, no running water, no sewage," he said.

Cineasta ayacuchano Briner Meza visitó la UNICA
content: Para compartir conocimientos, experiencias y trayectoria internacional con estudiantes del II ciclo de la Escuela Profesional de Ciencias de la Comunicación de la Universidad San Luis Gonzaga, el viernes último visitó la UNICA el reconocido y destacado Briner Meza Gutiérrez, ganador de concursos nacionales de proyectos Cortometrajes del Bicentenario. El referido cineasta es director de la producción cinematográfica «Resistencia», cortometraje realizado en quechua, y que narra la historia de un soldado que lucha con coraje, valentía y convicción por su familia. Ha participado en Festivales en Perú, Argentina, Colombia, Ecuador, Chile, entre otros. Al concluir la jornada académica dejó un mensaje claro a los estudiantes, a quienes animó a fortalecer las producciones del sétimo arte, teniendo en cuenta que en la región Ica poco se hace aún, para lo cual expresó su compromiso de apoyo a la nueva generación de comunicadores sociales que la sociedad espera. A N S E La entrada Cineasta ayacuchano Briner Meza visitó la UNICA se publicó primero en Diario La Opinión Ica .

title: Trump says he’s called off Iran strike planned for Tuesday at request of Gulf allies
content: By MICHELLE L. PRICE WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump said he is holding off on a military strike on Iran planned for Tuesday because “serious negotiations” are underway to end the war. Trump made the announcement in a social media post on Monday after threatening over the weekend that time was running out for Iran to strike a deal or fighting would renew. Last week, he said a fragile ceasefire was on “life support,” and U.S. forces exchanged fire with Iranian forces. The president, who had not previously disclosed that he was planning a strike for Tuesday, did not offer details about the planned attack in his Monday post but said he instructed the U.S. military “to be prepared to go forward with a full, large scale assault of Iran, on a moment’s notice, in the event that an acceptable Deal is not reached.” Trump has been threatening for weeks that the ceasefire struck in mid-April could end if Iran did not strike a deal, with shifting parameters for striking such an agreement. Over the weekend he warned, “For Iran, the Clock is Ticking, and they better get moving, FAST, or there won’t be anything left of them.” Trump said he was calling off the planned strike at the request of allies in the Middle East, including the leaders of Qatar, Saudi Arabia and the United Arab Emirates. The president has repeatedly set deadlines for Tehran and then backed off. But he’s also in the past indicated he would hold off on military action to allow talks to continue — only to turn around and launch strikes. That’s what happened at the war’s outset, when he ordered strikes shortly after indicating he would let talks play out. Trump in recent days has also spoken with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and Chinese President Xi Jinping about the Iran war. Trump’s post quickly caused a fall in the price of oil, which had been rising on the prospect of a prolonged standoff that would keep the Strait of Hormuz, a key shipping waterway, effectively closed. Minutes before the president’s announcement, petroleum futures had been trading at $108.83 a barrel. His word about negotiations almost instantly shaved more than $2 off the price as oil began to trade at roughly $106 a barrel. Bakhtiari nomads, wearing traditional dress, hold their guns during a pro-government gathering near the residence where former Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, shown on a banner, was killed in U.S. and Israeli strikes on Feb. 28, in Tehran, Iran, Monday, May 18, 2026. title: Heroes and Horses ranch in Madison County helps veterans heal through nature and horses
content: In Madison County, just past Virginia City, is a ranch actively making a difference in the lives of veterans across the nation. Heroes and Horses Ranch is a nonprofit founded by Micah and MacKenzie Fink that strives to transform the lives of veterans through nature, mindfulness, and horses. Micah Fink, the Founder and CEO, details his experience of coming home after his service to the country and how horses were an outlet and a way to find purpose. WATCH: Heroes and Horses helps veterans heal near Virginia City Heroes and Horses ranch near Virginia City helps veterans heal through nature and horses I was lost; I was completely lost. A lot of people are missing purpose, because in the military, your task and purpose is being in the military, Fink said, When you get out, its gonewhat guys come to realize is that your life is your purpose. For 41-days, veterans come to live on the ranch. There, they will sleep in log cabins with limited heat, no cellphones, take cold showers, eat clean, prepared food, and face the challenges the Montana wilderness has to offer on an extensive backcountry pack trip. You know theres not a pill on earth that can heal a broken heart. Theres not a substance on earth that can help somebody who needs to learn forgiveness. And so, what we aim to do here is empower experience, Fink said. Fink tells MTN news that a study came out from Duke University, Texas A&M, and the U.S. Department of Statistics, which estimates that it could be north of 44 veterans, who commit suicide a day. The journey taken at Heroes and Horses Ranch, Fink says, is remarkable as veterans forge ahead to take on the backcountry on packing trips, the physical demands that a day working cattle can impose, and the mental clarity that can be achieved by taking a moment to walk under the moonlight. What is it to have a good life? Fink says, Thats a very personal thing. Its for that person who they are showing up in their hearts and their homes and their families, the type of individuals they are in their communities, thats what were talking about, letting your character, letting your truth be your identity. As the name implies, at the heart of the organization: horses. Its unbelievable, youll have a guy thats really angry and hell have the calmest horse in the world. But when he approaches that animal, the animal starts getting wild. When the individual realizes that theyre really impacting the horses behavior, even if everythings internalized, they start to make a...

title: Long Island Rail Road strike could be a nightmare for N.Y. Gov. Kathy Hochul's reelection bid
content: If history is any indication, the Long Island Rail Road strike has potential to derail Democratic Gov. Kathy Hochul's bid for reelection. Although polls have Hochul comfortably ahead of her Republican opponent Bruce Blakeman, the governor might do well to remember the political consequences of the last LIRR strike 32 years ago. Lessons from the last LIRR strike LIRR union workers last went on strike in 1994, also an election year. Then-Gov. Mario Cuomo, desperate to win suburban support, gave in to union demands to end the strike in two days. Cuomo, a Democrat, still lost reelection to Republican George Pataki, who entered the race as an obscure upstate senator. Experts say it's a race Hochul should pay attention to. "The message is clear. Independent voters in Long Island were able to get Governor Pataki elected. Independent voters in Long Island vote in high propensity, and they may give this election to Bruce Blakeman if this is mishandled," said J.C. Polanco, assistant professor at University of Mount Saint Vincent. Hochul has so far been walking a tightrope between aggrieved union workers, who want too much, she says, and aggrieved Long Island commuters, who don't like the disruptions . An opportunity for Republicans A recent Siena poll had Blakeman, the Nassau County executive, trailing Hochul by 16 points. The strike could give him an opportunity to close the gap. Blakeman said union leaders told him they're "incredible frustrated." "They pointed out to me that there's no money for their workers, but there's $8 billion over the last three years for illegal migrants and $5.5 billion to bail out Zohran Mamdani in New York City. There's no money for Long Island, apparently," Blakeman said. Hochul's union problems are bigger than just LIRR workers, with union pension issues still a sticking point in state budget negotiations in Albany. "She's becoming more exposed every single day to the trade unions that she's anti-trade union. She fired 3,000 correctional officers last year because they struck for safety in the prisons, both for inmates and the officers. She scabbed the New York City nurses strike just a few months ago," said John Samuelsen, president of the Transport Workers Union. Strike getting statewide attention Showing fiscal competence is a good thing for Hochul, but there are other issues. Long Island voters are already upset with Hochul about Manhattan congestion pricing , and Blakeman is very popular in Nassau and Suffolk counties. The...

TJDFT homenageia terceirizados em cerimônia de valorização
content: O Tribunal de Justiça do Distrito Federal e dos Territórios (TJDFT) realizou, na tarde desta segunda-feira, 18/5, no auditório Sepúlveda Pertence, uma cerimônia de homenagem aos colaboradores terceirizados da instituição. A iniciativa integra o Programa de Valorização dos Terceirizados, instituído pela Portaria GPR 1192/2024, e teve como objetivo reconhecer a importância desses profissionais para o funcionamento cotidiano do tribunal e para a qualidade dos serviços prestados à sociedade. Durante o evento, o presidente do TJDFT, desembargador Jair Soares, parabenizou os colaboradores pelo trabalho diário em apoio à estrutura do tribunal. Ele destacou a atuação desses profissionais nas áreas de conservação, manutenção, limpeza, segurança e outros serviços essenciais, além de ressaltar que o cuidado com a coisa pública e o bom atendimento à população contribuem diretamente para a rotina de magistrados, servidores e jurisdicionados. O desembargador Roberval Belinati também participou da solenidade e ressaltou a relevância dos terceirizados para a rotina administrativa e para a construção de uma Justiça mais acolhedora, eficiente e próxima das pessoas. Segundo ele, trabalhadores da limpeza, motoristas, copeiras, garçons, ascensoristas, porteiros e demais profissionais exercem atividades essenciais à continuidade dos serviços do tribunal. O diretor do Fórum de Brasília, juiz Luis Martius Junior, afirmou que a atuação dos colaboradores terceirizados tem impacto direto na imagem do TJDFT perante a sociedade, especialmente no atendimento ao cidadão que chega ao Fórum em busca de orientação, acolhimento e acesso à Justiça. Ele observou que o contato com esses profissionais pode ser determinante para a percepção do usuário sobre o Poder Judiciário. Já o presidente da Associação dos Servidores da Justiça do Distrito Federal (Assejus), Fernando Freitas, destacou que a prestação jurisdicional é resultado de uma atuação coletiva, envolvendo magistrados, servidores e colaboradores terceirizados de diferentes áreas. Ao citar motoristas, garçons, vigilantes, profissionais de TI e outros trabalhadores, afirmou que cada função contribui para que a Justiça chegue à população. Ao final da cerimônia, foram entregues certificados de valorização aos profissionais terceirizados indicados pela alta administração do Tribunal, em reconhecimento aos serviços prestados à instituição. O evento, organizado pela...

title: Local Living: Summer at Edventure, Seniors and Caregivers Community Expo, Chili Cornbread Competition, Songbird Music Festival
content: COLUMBIA, S.C. (WOLO)— In today’s look at Local Living, you can kick off the Summer at Edventure Children’s Museum. The annual Kickoff to Summer event is a fun-filled day packed with hands-on activities, games, food trucks and more. It takes place Saturday, May 30 from 9 a.m. to 2 p.m. Admission is $15. The South Carolina Department on Aging is hosting the Seniors and Caregivers Community Expo in Saluda Tuesday, May 19. It’s from 11 a.m. to 1 p.m. at St. Paul United Methodist Church on East Butler Avenue. The first 100 attendees get a free lunch. There will be several vendors, door prizes, and more. It’s free to attend. Get your belly ready, Richland County Neighborhood Council is hosting its 3rd annual Chili Cornbread Competition this Friday, May 22. It’s from 10 a.m. to 3 p.m. at Pine Grove Community Center on Piney Woods Road. You can sample some tasty chili & cornbread, take part in wellness activities, win prizes, and more. It’s also free to attend. Don’t miss the inaugural Songbird Music Festival May 30 through May 31 at Finlay Park. The headliners for the event are Americana great Old Crow Medicine Show and Bluegrass Legend Sam Bush. 16 other local and national acts will also perform. Një shaka që “i ngriu gjakun” Ilirit, fermeri merr surprizën e veçantë
content: Ilir Shaqiri, i cili ka dy muaj në Ferma Vip e ka shprehur herë pas here mallin që ndjen për familjen e tij, e veçanërisht për vajzën, Emily. Vajza është pika e tij më e dobët, por një shaka e Agait “i ngriu gjakun”. Iliri u përball me disa lajme, që nuk ishin të vërteta. Në to shkruhej se vajza e tij ishte martuar pa praninë e tij. Edhe pse me bindje të plotë tha se vajza e tij nuk do e bënte një gjë të tillë pa praninë e babait, duart po i dridheshin dhe sytë iu mbushën me lot. Por pasi i thanë që kjo ishte një shaka, Iliri u takua me vajzën e tij Emily dhe të dashurin e saj. Mes emocionesh të forta, dy të rinjtë i dhanë lajmin e bukur, se kanë nisur të studiojnë dhe të mësojnë gjuhën shqipe.

Osmaniye'de Kontrolden Çıkan Araç Marketin Manavına Girdi
content: Osmaniye’de Trafik Kazası Osmaniye’nin Kadirli ilçesinde meydana gelen bir kaza, sürücüsünün direksiyon hakimiyetini kaybetmesi sonucu bir otomobilin marketin manav bölümüne girmesiyle sonuçlandı. Kazanın Ayrıntıları Olay, Kamil Kara Bulvarı üzerinde gerçekleşti. Sürücü, henüz kimliği belirlenemeyen otomobiliyle seyir halindeyken bir anda kontrolü kaybetti. Araç önce yol kenarındaki bir elektrik direğine çarptı, ardından park halindeki bir araca çarparak manav tezgahına girdi. Maddi Hasar Oluştu Şans eseri kimsenin yaralanmadığı kazada, araçlarda ve marketin manav bölümünde önemli maddi hasar meydana geldi. Olayla ilgili olarak ilgili makamlar tarafından inceleme başlatıldı. OSMANİYE’DE KONTROLDEN ÇIKAN OTOMOBİL MARKETİN MANAV BÖLÜMÜNE GİRDİ

Saltillo: la capital con mayor generación de empleo formal
content: Inversionistas encuentran en la ciudad factores como la seguridad pública, mano de obra calificada y calidad educativa El municipio de Saltillo se posicionó en el primer lugar nacional entre capitales en generación de empleo formal durante el primer cuatrimestre de 2026, de acuerdo con cifras emitidas por el Instituto Mexicano del Seguro Social, IMSS. “Saltillo se consolidó como la capital que mayor generación de empleos ha tenido de enero a abril; estamos hablando de más de 16 mil nuevos empleos en este 2026, muy por encima del segundo lugar entre las capitales del país. Esto refleja la confianza que existe para invertir aquí, gracias a factores como la seguridad, la mano de obra calificada y el alto grado de escolaridad que tiene nuestra ciudad”, señaló Javier Díaz González. En ese tenor, destacó la relevancia del apoyo que brinda el gobernador del Estado, Manolo Jiménez, a la capital de Coahuila. «Nuestro amigo Manolo Jiménez es el mejor aliado de Saltillo en seguridad, generación de empleos y en todos los temas» remarcó. Díaz González destacó que estos resultados reflejan también la confianza que inversionistas nacionales y extranjeros mantienen en Saltillo y en Coahuila para continuar desarrollando proyectos productivos y generar nuevas oportunidades laborales. La capital de Coahuila se colocó por encima de ciudades como Hermosillo, Chihuahua, Toluca, Oaxaca y La Paz, entre otras. Estos resultados consolidan a Saltillo como una ciudad referente en materia laboral y económica, además de fortalecer las condiciones para la llegada de nuevas inversiones que continúan impulsando la generación de empleo formal en la región. Cabe destacar que este indicador se suma a que la ciudad es, además, la capital más segura de México, de acuerdo con el INEGI; la más competitiva del país, con datos del IMCO; de mayor formalidad laboral, por parte del INEGI; y la más inclusiva, por el Teletón México. Estos indicadores, sumados a la estabilidad económica de la ciudad, brindan confianza a las micro, pequeñas, medianas y grandes empresas para invertir y crecer en la capital coahuilense. El dinamismo económico que mantiene Saltillo permite que miles de trabajadoras y trabajadores accedan a empleos formales con prestaciones y servicios de salud para sus familias. (El Heraldo de Saltillo) La entrada Saltillo: la capital con mayor generación de empleo formal se publicó primero en El Heraldo de Saltillo .

Sntp denuncia cierre de Venezuela News, medio vinculado a Alex Saab: más de 100 trabajadores fueron despedidos
content: Caracas .- El Sindicato Nacional de Trabajadores de la Prensa ( SNTP ) informó este 18 de mayo el cierre de operaciones del medio digital Venezuela News y el despido de más de 100 trabajadores , quienes fueron notificados de la medida bajo la figura de un “cierre temporal” y debieron abandonar sus puestos de trabajo. A través de su cuenta en X, el SNTP señaló que los empleados percibían salarios que rondaban los 400 dólares , dependiendo de sus funciones, y advirtió que la decisión deja sin empleo a un número significativo de trabajadores. El SNTP pidió transparencia sobre las causas del cierre y señaló que versiones preliminares apuntan a posibles problemas de financiamiento. El sindicato subrayó además que, aunque se trate de un medio vinculado a la propaganda oficialista, los trabajadores no deben quedar desprotegidos ante la medida. #AHORA | Venezuela News cerró operaciones y más de 100 trabajadores habrían sido notificados de su despido este #18May . Se conoció que este lunes los trabajadores, que ganaban alrededor de 400 dólares, dependiendo de sus funciones, fueron informados de la medida de "cierre... — SNTP (@sntpvenezuela) May 18, 2026 En paralelo, la organización Ve Sin Filtro ya había denunciado el bloqueo del sitio web de Venezuela News por parte de distintos proveedores de internet en el país, mediante restricciones aplicadas por DNS e IP. Entre los operadores señalados figuran CANTV, NetUno, Digitel, Movistar, Inter y G-Network , con distintos métodos de filtrado. 🚨 Bloquean sitio web de Venezuela News @AgenciaVNews agenciavn·com Venezuela News ha sido un canal de propaganda y noticias alineado al chavismo y vinculado a Alex Saab. Bloqueado por: CANTV : Bloqueo por DNS + IP NetUno: DNS Digitel: DNS Movistar: DNS Inter: IP G-network: DNS pic.twitter.com/zC5XND1BeI — VE sin Filtro (@vesinfiltro) May 18, 2026 Venezuela News y su vínculo con Alex Saab Venezuela News es un portal digital que se dio a conocer por la difusión de contenido político y narrativas alineadas con el chavismo, con presencia activa en redes sociales y estrategias de posicionamiento digital. El medio ha sido señalado en investigaciones de monitoreo digital y reportes de organizaciones como Cazadores de Fake News y C-Informa por su presunta vinculación con Alex Saab , así como por su rol dentro de ecosistemas de difusión de contenido político oficialista en internet. Según esos mismos reportes, el medio está dirigido por el comunicador...

title: 4 مطالب يتمسك بها لبنان خلال التفاوض مع إسرائيل
content: فيما يرتقب عقد جولة رابعة من المفاوضات بين لبنان وإسرائيل، أكد الرئيس اللبناني جوزيف عون أن الجانب اللبناني وضع إطارًا محددًا لهذه المحادثات. وحدّد عون في تصريحات من قصر بعبدا الاثنين 4 مطالب خلال المفاوضات. وقال إن “الإطار الذي وضعه لبنان للمفاوضات، يتمثل بالانسحاب الإسرائيلي ووقف إطلاق النار وانتشار الجيش اللبناني على الحدود فضلاً عن عودة النازحين إلى قراهم”. كما تحدث عن مساعدات اقتصادية أو مالية للبنان ضمن إطار المحادثات، مؤكداً أن كل ما يتم تناوله خلاف ذلك فهو غير صحيح. إلى ذلك، أكد أنه سيقوم بـ “المستحيل كي يوقف الحرب”. وقال: “لقد اختبرنا الحروب فإلى أين أوصلت لبنان، هل من أحد يستطيع تحمل كلفتها بعد؟”. أتت تلك التصريحات فيما واصلت إسرائيل غاراتها على الجنوب اللبناني، رغم دخول التمديد لوقف إطلاق النار حيز التنفيذ. وكانت واشنطن أكدت يوم الجمعة الماضي تمديد وقف إطلاق النار لمدة 45 يومًا، بعد انتهاء الجولة الثالثة من المفاوضات اللبنانية- الإسرائيلية التي عقدت يومي الخميس والجمعة الماضيين في العاصمة الأميركية. كما أعلنت انطلاق مسار أمني، بين البلدين في وزارة الدفاع الأميركية يوم 29 من الشهر الجاري، بمشاركة وفود عسكرية من كلا البلدين، على أن يُستأنف المسار السياسي في الثاني والثالث من يونيو المقبل.

Macacos-barrigudos resgatados em MT são enviados para santuário em MG
content: A Secretaria de Estado de Meio Ambiente (Sema/MT) iniciou, nesta segunda-feira (18), o transporte de dois macacos-barrigudos, espécie classificada na lista nacional como vulnerável, para o Santuário Onça Pintada, em Curvelo, Minas Gerais. Também estão sendo destinados ao Santuário nove jacarés-do-Pantanal com características albinoides e um tamanduá-mirim. O encaminhamento dos animais para o empreendimento de fauna voltado para a conservação das espécies ocorre em parceria com o Instituto Brasileiro do Meio Ambiente e dos Recursos Naturais Renováveis (Ibama), Instituto Chico Mendes de Conservação de Biodiversidade (ICMBio). O manejo é realizado de acordo com o Plano Nacional de Conservação, resguardando que os animais além de conservar a genética da sua população, poderão participar de programas de reprodução e reintrodução de suas espécies realizados por diversas instituições do país. Todos os animais silvestres passaram por avaliação clínica, como explica o médico veterinário Vinicius Brito, que atua na Coordenadoria de Fauna Silvestre da Sema. “Estes animais recebem avaliações veterinárias rotineiras e cuidados diários, garantindo o bem-estar de todos”, informou. A Sema participa de vários planos nacionais de ação de conservação de Espécies Ameaçadas de Extinção (PAN) como por exemplo de onças, primatas amazônicos, e do Cerrado Pantanal (Cerpan). Estes programas são criados para defender a fauna e envolvem pesquisa, manejo e educação ambiental, protegendo espécies e habitats. “A competência originária para definir diretrizes que envolvam espécies ameaçadas de extinção é do Governo Federal. Isto se materializa em atos concretos realizados nos Planos de Ação Nacionais (PANs), dos quais a Sema é membro partícipe de vários”, explica a médica veterinária e analista ambiental da Sema, Danny Moraes. O Gerente de Fauna Silvestre, Marlon Gallina, relata que os animais destinados são oriundos de diversas localidades do Estado, como Juína, Confresa e Cuiabá, demonstrando assim a capilaridade das ações da Sema por meio das unidades descentralizadas (DUDS) e da própria Gerência de Fauna Silvestres.

Sela padi të re për Berishën/ Kandidatja e skualifikuar nga gara për kryetar të PD plotëson detajet e munguara
content: Mereme Sela korrigjon padinë me të meta. Kandidatja e skualifikuar nga gara për kryetar të PD, ka dorëzuar padi të re në Gjykatën e Shkallës së Parë Tiranë, pasi kjo e fundit ia ktheu me argumentin se padia e parë as mund të dorëzohej, as mund të pranohej sepse kishte mangësi. Kësaj radhe, Mereme Sela ka dorëzuar dokumentacionin e plotë të vendimeve partiake për skualifikimet dhe garën me një kandidat në PD, ndërsa është treguar shumë e kujdesshme edhe në detaje. Mjekja ka dorëzuar çdo të dhënë si për veten dhe për doktorin. Të dhëna, ditëlindje, adresë shtëpie, por me apo pa dashje, në gjeneralitetet e dorëzuara për doktorin, ajo ka shkruar “Sali Berisha, i biri i Ramës”. Atësia nuk ndryshohet apo mohohet, por mënyra e formulimit ironikisht i shkon më shumë për kundërshtarin politik. Por përtej kësaj rastësie komike, tashmë çështja komplikohet, mund të bëhet tragjike. Mereme Sela s’ka më të meta. Ajo madje ka paguar edhe tarifat gjyqësore të padisë. Sela kërkon pezullimin e zgjedhjeve të 23 majit në PD, rikthimin e saj në garën për kryetar, si dhe skualifikimin dhe moslejimin e kandidimit të Sali Berishës për kryetar referuar nenit Basha sipas statutit të PD. Meremja e bëri të veten, tani i mbetet Gjykatës të vendosë për doktorin. Zgjedhjet moderne të së shtunës, mund të kthehen në një festë të hidhur për doktorin. Gara me veten nuk qenka dhe aq e lehtë sa çfarë u mendua. Burimi: botasot.info The post Sela padi të re për Berishën/ Kandidatja e skualifikuar nga gara për kryetar të PD plotëson detajet e munguara appeared first on aktuale.mk .

A 2nd Harris County murder defendant cuts off ankle monitor right before trial
content: For the second time in the month of May, a Harris County murder defendant allegedly cut off his court-ordered GPS ankle monitor just before his trial was scheduled to begin. A murder trial for 32-year-old Walter Pozos was scheduled to start last Wednesday, but according to records, but two days before his GPS monitor started generating a tamper alert early Monday morning. It would have been Pozos’ second murder trial this year, after a mistrial was declared in February because of a hung jury. Pozos had been out of jail on a total $35,000 bond since Oct. 2023, the Harris County District Attorney’s Office confirmed. In July of 2023, Pozos allegedly sped away from Harris County sheriff’s deputies at speeds over 100 miles per hour, which led to a crash, and one of his friends in the car passed away. Another passenger was injured, according to the Harris County Sheriff’s Office. We know this brings up questions about public safety, so KPRC 2 News has reached out to Harris County Pretrial Services, the agency tasked with monitoring defendants on bond to learn more about how this could have happened and what can be done to stop this from happening. We’re still waiting for a response. The U.S. Marshals Service confirmed agents are involved in the search for Pozos alongside Harris County sheriff’s deputies. It’s not clear if he is still in Harris County. Pozos now faces additional felonies in Harris County, including bail jumping and tampering with an electronic monitor, records show. Bond on his initial cases has been forfeited, according to court records. The situation with Pozos comes just about two weeks after Lee Gilley, accused of strangling his pregnant wife Christa Bauer in Oct. 2024, cut off his ankle monitor and flew to Italy using a fake name, according to a federal criminal complaint. Police in Milan stopped Gilley with forged travel documents, according to records, and he has now claimed asylum.

title: Justice Department Charges Maduro Ally Alex Saab With Money Laundering
content: U.S. prosecutors charged Alex Saab, known as the “bag man” for former Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro, with money laundering over his alleged exploitation of a Venezuelan welfare plan, according to court filings unsealed on Monday. Saab, a top ally of Maduro’s, was deported by Venezuelan interim President Delcy Rodriguez over the weekend to the U.S. in a move that she said was “justified by national interests.” The deportation signaled a new level of coordination between the Trump administration and Rodriguez, Maduro’s former vice president. Saab, the 55-year-old former Venezuelan minister of industry, conspired to bribe Venezuelan officials and transferred money through U.S. bank accounts to enrich himself, prosecutors alleged. He made his initial court appearance on Monday afternoon in a Miami federal court. The charges come as the administration of President Donald Trump prepares to try Maduro, who was captured by U.S. special forces in Caracas earlier this year. Saab could provide U.S. authorities with information to strengthen their criminal case against Maduro, Reuters previously reported. “These charges are a direct result of DEA’s continued commitment to dismantle the corrupt networks operating throughout Venezuela,” said U.S. Drug Enforcement Administration Administrator Terrance Cole. — (Reporting by Dan Rosenzweig-Ziff; Editing by Michael Learmonth and Bill Berkrot) The post Justice Department Charges Maduro Ally Alex Saab With Money Laundering appeared first on GV Wire .

Gas surges past $4 a gallon while tomato and beef prices notch new records. A look at rising costs amid the Iran war
content: The Bureau of Labor Statistics’ latest consumer price report is here, and the data shows most grocery staples trending upward, electric costs at all-time highs and gas prices back above $4 per gallon nationally for the first time since 2022. Overall, inflation accelerated in April, with costs rising 0.6%. Though steep, the monthly increase is slightly less than the 0.9% reported in March. Year-over-year, prices are up 3.8% — nearly double the Federal Reserve’s target of 2%. Elevated prices have been driven largely by soaring energy costs, accounting for over 40% of the month-over-month increase. Higher energy costs, in turn, are a product of the Iran war. Amid fighting with the United States, Israel and surrounding Gulf states, the Islamic Republic has effectively closed the Strait of Hormuz , through which a fifth of the world’s oil and gas is shipped. In response, the U.S. Navy has implemented its own blockade of Iranian ports, tankers have been seized and the flow of fuel out of the region has trickled to a halt. As a result, global markets are experiencing upheaval and crude oil prices have remained above $100 a barrel. Stateside, this has translated into higher fuel costs. Since the start of the war, retail gas prices have spiked more than 50% nationwide, and diesel, which trucks use to transport all kinds of goods and agricultural products across the country, has similarly sprung up 48%, according to data from the U.S. Energy Information Administration. And increased shipping and transportation costs? That means higher prices on everything from groceries to airline tickets and your morning latte. The Tribune is tracking 11 everyday costs for Americans — eggs, milk, bread, bananas, oranges, tomatoes, chicken, ground beef, gasoline, electricity and natural gas — and how they are changing, or not, under the second Trump administration. This tracker is updated monthly using consumer price index data from the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics. To see the average U.S. price of a specific good, click on the dropdown arrow below and select the item you wish to view. Eggs Eggs are one of the few grocery items that saw a price drop in April. The nationwide average fell another 10 cents month-over-month, landing at $2.25 per dozen. Costs have cooled significantly following a massive outbreak of bird flu last winter and spring, which disrupted the egg supply and sent retail prices soaring. Since then, the average cost for a dozen large Grade A eggs has declined...

title: Intentó robar un pack de cervezas de un comercio y terminó internado en terapia intensiva
content: Un intento de hurto en un comercio de Rawson terminó con un fuerte forcejeo entre el dueño del local y el presunto ladrón, quien debió ser trasladado al hospital tras sufrir una lesión en el cuello. El hecho ocurrió este domingo alrededor de las 20.30 en un comercio ubicado sobre Alejandro Maíz, según confirmó el jefe de la Comisaría de Rawson, Fortunato Jara, en diálogo con LU20. De acuerdo al relato policial, el propietario del local se encontraba atendiendo cuando advirtió, a través de las cámaras de seguridad, que uno de los clientes intentaba llevarse mercadería sin pagar. “Ingresa una persona acompañada de otra que no tiene participación. Este masculino toma bebidas alcohólicas, sería un pack de cerveza, y lo oculta entre sus prendas”, explicó Jara. El comerciante observó la maniobra mediante el sistema de videovigilancia del negocio y decidió intervenir antes de que el sospechoso abandonara el lugar. “Le solicita que deje esos elementos y, si bien el autor del hecho deja las bebidas, se produce un altercado y una discusión entre ellos”, detalló el jefe policial. La situación rápidamente pasó de una discusión verbal a un enfrentamiento físico. Según indicó Jara, el forcejeo comenzó dentro del comercio y luego continuó en el exterior del local. TERMINÓ HOSPITALIZADO POR UNA LESIÓN EN EL CUELLO Durante el enfrentamiento, el comerciante habría reducido al sospechoso utilizando fuerza física, situación que derivó en una lesión que obligó a trasladar al hombre al hospital. “El comerciante, al defenderse, ejerce fuerza sobre el autor del hurto y esta persona termina lesionada, siendo trasladada al hospital producto de una asfixia generada en el cuello”, señaló el comisario. Por el momento no trascendió la gravedad de las lesiones sufridas por el sospechoso ni si quedó detenido tras recibir atención médica. La Policía intervino en el lugar y tomó declaración a las partes para determinar cómo ocurrió el episodio y establecer eventuales responsabilidades. El caso quedó ahora bajo investigación judicial para esclarecer las circunstancias del forcejeo y definir la situación tanto del presunto autor del intento de robo como del comerciante involucrado en el hecho.

MEA defends India's democracy in Oslo amid tense exchange with reporter
content:
The Ministry of External Affairs on Monday defended India's democratic framework, constitutional values, diversity and human rights record while responding to questions raised by a journalist in Oslo on issues raising concerns on press freedom and human rights in India amidst Prime Minister Narendra Modi's visit to Norway.

While addressing reporters here, a journalist repeatedly demanded an answer from the MEA officials over why 'India should be trusted', leading to a tense exchange of words between MEA Secretary (West) Sibi George and a reporter from Norway.

MEA Defends India's Democratic Credentials

The MEA Secretary (West) said India's Constitution guarantees fundamental rights to all citizens and provides legal remedies in cases of rights violations. Highlighting India's democratic values, he said the country ensured equal voting rights for women from the time of independence.

George further stated that India believes in equality and human rights, adding that the right to vote and change governments remains the strongest example of democratic freedom. "We have a constitution which guarantees the rights of the people, fundamental rights of the people. We have, you know, we have equal rights for the women of our country, which is very important. In 1947, we gave the freedom to vote for our women. We together, we won the freedom together and they won itself. Many countries I know, the voting right for women came after several decades after India gave that freedom. You know, this, because we believe in equality, we believe in human rights. And what is the best example of human rights? The right to change government, the right to vote. And that is what is happening in India. We are so proud of that," said Sibi George.

While answering the question, the MEA Secretary (West) repeatedly requested not to be interrupted while he answers, adding, "Let me answer the question, please don't interrupt me. You asked a question--this is my press conference. You asked why should a country trust India, let me answer that question."

Vibrant Media Landscape

Referring to the scale and diversity of India's media landscape, George said the country has a vibrant and highly active press ecosystem operating in multiple languages. Stressing that India's scale and diversity are often misunderstood, and said, "You know how many stories are up here. We have how many breaking news coming every day in the evening. At least 200 TV...

Huntington Beach faces $50k monthly fine for ignoring state housing mandate
content: The median home price in Orange County reached $1 million in 2022 for the first time in history. (Allen J. Schaben / Los Angeles Times via Getty Images) Huntington Beach must pay $50,000 for each month it continues to fail to comply with the state’s mandate to zone for more housing, according to a recent court ruling. For several years now, the city has been waging a court battle against the state's order to make way for 40,000 new homes. The judge ruled that the city should be penalized $10,000 per month going back to January 2025, and then fined $50,000 per month, starting next month, until the city gets a compliant housing element approved. The backstory State law requires California cities and counties to plan for enough housing to meet the expected demand over an eight-year time period, including for low-income housing. Huntington Beach, citing its independence as a charter city, has fought its most recent housing allocation all the way up to the U.S. Supreme Court, which declined to review the case last year. Does the state require cities to actually build that many homes? No. Cities are not required to actually build housing, but rather to make sure their zoning and land use codes accommodate the amount of housing assigned to them through what’s known as the Regional Housing Needs Assessment (RHNA). What does the city say? In a statement, Casey McKeon, the city’s mayor, said the city “strongly opposes these penalties and will continue fighting for the rights of our residents and for the principle of local control against ongoing efforts by the Attorney General to centralize land use authority in Sacramento.” Is Huntington Beach an outlier? Yes. Huntington Beach is an outlier in its aggressive fight against the state housing mandates. More than 90% of California’s 539 jurisdictions are in compliance with the state requirement to plan for the amount of housing assigned to them through the latest RHNA cycle. What’s next? The city recently posted draft revisions to its housing plan — for the first time since 2021. That’s significant because the city’s efforts to come into state compliance have been paused for years. One complication with compliance: Huntington Beach residents voted to require any major changes to the city’s zoning, including its state-mandated housing plan, to be put up for a public vote. That could mean more delays in coming into state compliance, and consequently, more fines, at a time when the city is facing a budget crunch.

title: Barbados urged to become creator of global tech solutions
content: B arbados must seize a narrowing window of opportunity to transform itself from a consumer of imported technologies into a creator of globally competitive solutions, Minister of Industry Senator Jonathan Reid has warned, as he called for urgent, strategic action to harness artificial intelligence and digital tools for national development. The minister opened his remarks at the BMA’s State of the Industry conference by contrasting the event with standard political gatherings, expressing his excitement to engage directly with practical builders. He noted that he often spends time in rooms where a wide distance exists between policy and making things real. But he praised the audience as a community dedicated to turning concepts into tangible outcomes. “I think we have a particular moment in time where more than ever before, we need to be in the business of converting incredible ideas into incredible products and incredible solutions that meet the new world,” Senator Reid said. Acknowledging the traditional limitations associated with small island economies, he challenged the conventional narrative of vulnerability. He observed that regional structures are frequently driven by the limitations of small populations, small market sizes, and limited opportunities. However, the rapid proliferation of modern digital tools has fundamentally levelled the playing field. “For the first time in history, if you think about it, the most sophisticated tools, the most advanced technologies ever created by man, is in all of our pockets right now,” Senator Reid said, highlighting the accessibility of generative AI platforms like ChatGPT and Claude. “Once you have generative AI on your phone, you have access to a rocket ship to do things that have a scale, at a pace, at a quality that small nations never thought possible to do before.” He contrasted this current digital democratisation with industrial revolutions of the past. A century ago, advanced technologies like aviation and large-scale manufacturing were out of reach for small territories, leaving them as mere technology takers that produced lesser-standard duplicates. Today, that dynamic has been completely disrupted. “Someone, a kid in Grazettes or a kid in Crab Hill, has the same access to that rocket ship that a kid in Singapore, a kid in San Francisco, or a kid in Toronto has at the same time,” said Senator Reid. “That is new for us.” While expressing immense optimism, he also shared his singular concern regarding...

India, Norway elevate ties to green strategic partnership: MEA
content:
The Ministry of External Affairs on Monday said Prime Minister Narendra Modi's visit to Norway marked a significant milestone in India-Norway ties, with both countries elevating their relationship to a green strategic partnership. Addressing reporters after the Prime Minister's engagements in Oslo, MEA Secretary (West) Sibi George said the new partnership would add a strategic dimension to bilateral cooperation in climate action, renewable energy, resilient supply chains, green technologies and the blue economy.

"The visit was marked by a special milestone in India-Norway bilateral relationship as the leaders have elevated the bilateral relationship to a green strategic partnership to provide a strategic dimension to the collaboration in climate action, renewable energy, resilient supply chains, green technologies and blue economy," he said.

PM Modi Conferred Norway's Grand Cross

Highlighting another key outcome of the visit, George said Prime Minister Modi was conferred the Grand Cross of the Royal Norwegian Order of Merit by the Norwegian monarch. George said the honour was bestowed upon PM Modi for his "outstanding service in the interest of India-Norway relations and mankind."

"The Prime Minister was conferred the Grand Cross of the Royal Norwegian Order of Merit by His Majesty. This is the highest degree of award in the Royal Norwegian Order of Merit. It was conferred upon the Prime Minister for his outstanding service in the interest of India-Norway relations and mankind. Prime Minister Modi expressed his gratitude and dedicated the award to the people of India and the enduring friendship between India and Norway," said Sibi George.

Maritime Cooperation and Indo-Pacific

Referring to maritime cooperation between the two countries, George said India welcomed Norway's decision to join the Indo-Pacific Oceans Initiative. He further noted that both sides agreed to expand cooperation in the blue economy sector, including shipbuilding, green shipping, ship recycling, port infrastructure development, seafarer training, fisheries, aquaculture and greening of ports.

"As leading maritime nations, we welcome the decision by Norway to join the Indo-Pacific Oceans Initiative...Both leaders have called for scaling up the blue economy partnership, including in shipbuilding, green shipping, ship recycling, port infrastructure development, seafarer training, fisheries, aquaculture, and the greening of ports,"...

TMC alleges 'vote theft', questions EVMs; to submit findings to SC
content:
Trinamool Congress (TMC) MP Dola Sen has said the party is carrying out a fact-finding exercise on alleged "vote theft" by analysing vote losses and margins affected during the Special Intensive Revision (SIR), while also questioning how EVMs reportedly retained over 90 per cent charge and why a recount was not allowed. She added that the party has already approached the Supreme Court on the matter and will submit the findings of the internal review to the party leadership.

Speaking to the reporters, Sen said, "We are conducting fact-finding on two fronts, first, to investigate 'Vote Chori' (vote theft) by examining how many votes we lost by, and the vote margins cancelled through the Special Intensive Revision (SIR); and second, to understand why the EVMs retained a charge of more than 90% and why a recount of the votes was not permitted."

"We have filed a case in the Supreme Court regarding all these matters, and we will provide all the feedback from this investigation to the party leadership," she further said.

Mamata Banerjee Appears in Court Over Post-Poll Violence

On Thursday, former West bengal chief minister Mamata Banerjee appeared before Chief Justice HC Sujoy Pal in connection with a public interest litigation (PIL) related to alleged post-poll violence in the state following the 2026 State Assembly polls results. The petition was filed by advocate Sirsanya Banerjee, son of Trinamool Congress leader and advocate Kalyan Banerjee. The petitioner alleged incidents of post-poll violence in several areas, including attacks on party offices and the displacement of workers.

Banerjee urged for "immediate protection of people," alleging that "In front of police they are doing hooliganism, burning." She further alleged, "Children are not spared, minorities are not spared, women are not spared. 10 of our workers have been murdered."

BJP Forms Government After Historic Mandate

Following the election results, the TMC's 15-year rule came to an end after the BJP restricted the party to 80 seats. The BJP formed its first-ever government in Bengal, with Suvendu Adhikari as the Chief Minister, after the party secured a huge mandate of 207 seats.

(Except for the headline, this story has not been edited by Asianet Newsable English staff and is published from a syndicated feed.)
